#イラスト #插畫
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-05-02
提示詞 Prompt
現代イラストを沒骨法で解釈したスタイル。硬い線を排除し、柔らかい筆のぼかしと色の滲みだけで形を構築。肌や服のグラデーションを美しく表現し、背景は餘白を活かしたシンプルな構成に。表情とシルエットは損なわず、伝統的な沒骨法の溫かみと現代的な親しみやすさを両立させた優しい雰囲気。和紙のテクスチャと自然な墨・彩色の滲みを加えて。
uni_6046 Steampunk Scientific Illustrator 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@GeekCatX
#steampunk #蒸氣龐克 #插畫 #雙魚座
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-05-01
提示詞 Prompt
[中文] （Steampunk Scientific Illustrator）你是一位專業復古蒸汽朋克解剖圖譜設計師，擅長星座機械結構科普海報。根據用戶指定的【{constellation_name}】，生成一張復古蒸汽朋克風格星座解剖圖譜海報：頂部標題欄爲“{constellation_name}解剖圖譜”或“ANATOMIA {constellation_en}”，採用復古絲帶橫幅設計；背景爲做舊羊皮紙/泛黃舊紙張紋理，帶自然污漬與摺痕，營造復古科學手稿質感；中心主體爲該星座經典神話形象，內部結構替換爲精密齒輪、管線、金屬骨骼等蒸汽朋克元素；所有圖標與插畫爲手繪線稿風格，用箭頭或連線展示邏輯關係；主色調爲暖棕、米黃、古銅色，點綴少量高對比色彩突出重點；畫面分左右兩欄，中心爲主體形象，兩側分佈功能模塊，底部爲總結與表格。左側含3-5個功能模塊（含圖標、標題、描述）及“五層性格結構”分層圖示；右側含3-5個特質模塊（含圖標、標籤）及“Relationship classification”“Ecological niche”板塊；底部設“Advantages/Risks comparison table”優勢風險對比表、“Survival guide”生存指南、底部人生哲學宣言橫幅。整體嚴謹精緻、復古機械美學，文字清晰可讀 4K高清，直接出圖，星座爲【射手座 / Sagittarius】。 [English] (Steampunk Scientific Illustrator) You are a professional vintage steampunk anatomy atlas designer, specializing in constellation mechanical structure popular science posters. Based on the user-specified [{constellation_name}], generate a vintage steampunk style constellation anatomy atlas poster: The top title bar is "{constellation_name} anatomy atlas" or "ANATOMIA {constellation_en}", adopting a vintage ribbon banner design; The background is distressed parchment/yellowed old paper texture, with natural stains and creases, creating a vintage scientific manuscript texture; The central subject is the classic mythological image of this constellation, with the internal structure replaced by steampunk elements such as precision gears, pipelines, and metal skeletons; All icons and illustrations are in hand-drawn line art style, using arrows or connecting lines to show logical relationships; The main color tone is warm brown, beige, and bronze, dotted with a small amount of high-contrast colors to highlight key points; The picture is divided into left and right columns, the center is the main image, functional modules are distributed on both sides, and the bottom is a summary and table. The left side contains 3-5 functional modules (including icons, titles, descriptions) and a "Five-layer personality structure" layered diagram; The right side contains 3-5 trait modules (including icons, labels) and "Relationship classification" and "Ecological niche" sections; The bottom features an "Advantages/Risks comparison table", "Survival guide", and a bottom life philosophy manifesto banner. Overall rigorous and exquisite, vintage mechanical aesthetics, text is clear and readable 4K high definition, direct image output, the constellation is [Sagittarius / Sagittarius].
uni_6054 10 × 10 grid of 100 different fantasy RPG items rendered in classic pixel art style 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
#game #RPG #weapon
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-05-02
提示詞 Prompt
[中文] 創建一個包含100種不同奇幻RPG物品的10×10網格，以經典像素藝術風格渲染（16位或32位精靈圖美學，讓人聯想到SNES/GBA時代的日式RPG）。每個物品應出現在其獨立的方形瓷磚中，下方帶有簡短清晰的標籤。在白色背景上保持網格整潔。使每個物品在視覺上都有所區分，並且每個標籤拼寫正確。使用清晰的像素邊緣、每個精靈圖有限的調色板，以及用於陰影的微妙抖動。 使用這些行主題： 第1行：劍與刀刃 第2行：盾牌與盔甲 第3行：弓、弩與遠程武器 第4行：法杖、魔杖與魔法焦點 第5行：藥水、靈藥與燒瓶 第6行：卷軸、典籍與法術書 第7行：戒指、護身符與附魔小飾品 第8行：頭盔、王冠與頭飾 第9行：鑰匙、遺物與任務物品 第10行：寶石、符文與製作材料 將每個瓷磚顯示爲乾淨背景方形上居中的物品精靈圖，渲染爲經典的庫存圖標——你在奇幻RPG菜單中會看到的那種。保持整體風格一致、連貫，並讓人聯想到備受喜愛的復古奇幻RPG——迷人、細節豐富，且在小尺寸下易於辨認。 [English] Create a 10 × 10 grid of 100 different fantasy RPG items rendered in classic pixel art style (16-bit or 32-bit sprite aesthetic, reminiscent of SNES/GBA-era JRPGs). Each item should appear in its own square tile with a short clear label underneath. Keep the grid neat on a white background. Make every item visually distinct and every label correctly spelled. Use crisp pixel edges, limited palette per sprite, and subtle dithering for shading. Use these row themes: Row 1: swords and blades Row 2: shields and armor Row 3: bows, crossbows, and ranged weapons Row 4: staves, wands, and magical foci Row 5: potions, elixirs, and flasks Row 6: scrolls, tomes, and spellbooks Row 7: rings, amulets, and enchanted trinkets Row 8: helmets, crowns, and headgear Row 9: keys, relics, and quest items Row 10: gems, runes, and crafting materials Show each tile as a centered item sprite on a clean background square, rendered as a classic inventory icon — the kind you'd see in a fantasy RPG menu. Keep the overall style consistent, cohesive, and reminiscent of beloved retro fantasy RPGs — charming, detailed, and instantly readable at small sizes.
uni_6033 高級極簡人像海報 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@qisi_ai
#人物肖像 #攝影 #棚拍 #制服 #uniform
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：img2img | 日期：2026-05-01
提示詞 Prompt
將使用者上傳的人物照片轉換為一張直式 3:4 的高級極簡人像海報。 保留原圖中人物的真實身份特徵、五官結構、髮型、髮色、服裝、首飾、姿勢和整體氣質。不要換臉，不要改變人物年齡、性別、種族或核心外貌。可以適度優化皮膚質感、光影、清晰度、服裝細節和整體精緻度，使畫面呈現專業棚拍人像效果。 將原圖背景替換為乾淨的灰白色漸層棚拍背景，背景簡潔、柔和、有高級感。人物以半身肖像構圖呈現，置中或略微偏右，保留適當留白。光線為柔和均勻的商業攝影燈光，臉部清晰，膚色自然，整體質感細膩、真實、時尚。 畫面風格參考高端人像證件海報、時尚雜誌封面、Portrait ID 風格、極簡主義視覺設計。整體畫面乾淨、剋制、專業，具有高級品牌海報感。 在畫面左下角加入三行英文文字。使用者可以輸入自訂文字，如果使用者沒有輸入，則自動生成適合該人物氣質的英文文案。使用者輸入中文時，必須先翻譯成自然、簡潔、高級的英文後再顯示在畫面中，畫面中不要出現中文。 文字排版要求： 主標題使用深藍色粗體無襯線字體，字號較大，放在左下角最上方。副標題使用白色中等字號，位於主標題下方。系列文字使用白色大寫無襯線字體，位於副標題下方。三行文字整體左對齊，排版簡潔清晰，不遮擋人物臉部，不影響人物主體。 輸出要求： 圖片比例為 3:4，直式海報構圖，高清，真實攝影質感，高級極簡風格，商業棚拍光效，乾淨背景，時尚人像海報。 主標題 人物姓名 / 暱稱 / 藝名： 副標題 人物氣質 / 身份定位 / 品牌短句： 系列文字 系列編號 + 風格主題：

uni_6045 唐朝貴族女子在御花園中漫步 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@johnAGI168
#唐朝 #工筆畫 #異形 #牡丹 #蝴蝶
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-05-01
提示詞 Prompt
[中文] 一幅細節豐富的工筆畫，描繪了一位唐朝貴族女子在御花園中漫步。她看起來優雅而平靜。 她手裏拿着一根金色的牽引繩。牽引繩的盡頭是一隻可怕的**異形怪物（出自電影《異形》）**。然而，這隻異形穿着一件**可愛的粉色絲綢馬甲**，並且表現得像一隻訓練有素的狗。 背景有牡丹和蝴蝶。 **在右下角，有一個紅色的豎排藝術家印章，寫着“吳先生”（Mr. Wu），風格像水印一樣。** --ar 3:4 [English] A finely detailed Gongbi painting of a noble Tang Dynasty lady taking a stroll in the imperial garden. She looks elegant and calm. She is holding a gold leash. At the end of the leash is a terrifying **Xenomorph monster (from the movie Alien)**. However, the Xenomorph is wearing a **cute pink silk vest** and is behaving like a well-trained dog. Background features peonies and butterflies. **In the bottom right corner, a single red vertical artist chop seal reads "吳先生" (Mr. Wu), stylized like a watermark.** --ar 3:4
uni_6073 Q版 Yuuna 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：FB@Anshun Cheng
#LINE #Q版 #表情 #expression
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-05-02
提示詞 Prompt
使用上傳圖片作為唯一角色參考，保持人物五官與身份完全一致，不可改變或生成不同的人。 生成一張 4x4 的 LINE 貼圖（共16格，1:1比例）。 基本要求： - 每一格都要有不同的表情與動作 - 每一格需包含簡短的繁體中文文字，內容需符合情緒與日常對話 - 不可出現重複情緒或重複語句 - 讓每一張貼圖都像真實聊天情境中的瞬間，情緒可以略微誇張以增加感染力 風格： 寫實風格，高細節，柔和光線，皮膚細緻，整體可愛且帶一點點微撩感，表情生動自然 構圖： - 4x4整齊排列，每格間距一致 - 每格獨立清楚，不重疊 - 以近景或半身為主 - 背景乾淨或柔和色系 文字： - 使用繁體中文 - 字體清晰、粗體、易讀 - 放置自然，不遮擋臉部 情緒方向（自由發揮）： 包含但不限於： 打招呼、撒嬌、開玩笑、小生氣、無奈、疲累、開心、驚訝等日常情境 避免： 模糊、變臉、比例錯誤、表情重複、排版混亂、文字無法辨識
uni_6037 A character promotional poster 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@AiwithLariab
#插畫 #poster
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-05-01
提示詞 Prompt
A character promotional poster titled “INPUT NAME”, designed in a cinematic vertical key visual composition (9:16). The upper half features a large, softly glowing silhouette of an anime girl’s face formed from flowing wind and cherry blossom particles. The silhouette feels dreamy, delicate, and slightly transparent. The lower section shows the full-body character standing gently in a calm pose, wearing an elegant modern kimono-inspired outfit with light fabric movement. Inside the silhouette, use double-exposure storytelling: floating cherry blossoms, memory fragments, soft sky gradients, emotional close-up moments, and subtle nature elements blended into watercolor mist. Left side contains warm pink tones and floral energy, while right side has cool sky blues for balance. A thin glowing breeze line connects top silhouette to the character below. Edges are soft, painterly, and fade into white negative space with an ethereal anime aesthetic.
uni_6031 A bright, summery commercial product photography shot featuring a refreshing beverage on a weathered wooden table 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@highball_cho
#design #設計 #poster #product
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-05-01
提示詞 Prompt
A bright, summery commercial product photography shot featuring a refreshing beverage on a weathered wooden table. In the sharp foreground, there is 1 tall glass filled with a golden, bubbly iced drink garnished with 1 lemon slice and a sprig of rosemary, sitting next to 1 silver aluminum can covered in cold condensation. The can prominently displays the English text {argument name="product name" default="TOKYO HIGHBALL"} below a small gold star logo, featuring a graphic of the drink itself and the Japanese text "アルコール分 7%" near the bottom. To the right of the can, 2 cut lemon wedges rest on the table. In the softly blurred background, a sunny beach scene unfolds with sparkling turquoise water and a clear blue sky. Standing to the left in the background is 1 young woman with long brown hair, wearing a white sleeveless top and a light blue skirt, looking out toward the ocean. Floating elegantly in the sky above the scene is the Japanese text {argument name="catchphrase" default="夏、これがいい。"}. The overall lighting is radiant and inviting, with sparkling bokeh and lens flares emphasizing the crisp, cold, and refreshing atmosphere of a perfect summer day.

uni_6043 Add multiple small, cute chibi-style “mini versions” of her around the image 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@Ciri_ai
#chibi #effect
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：img2img | 日期：2026-05-01
提示詞 Prompt
Edit the image while keeping the original photo completely unchanged — including the person, face, body, pose, lighting, and gym background. Add multiple small, cute chibi-style “mini versions” of her around the image. Each mini character should have a big head, expressive facial features, and match her hairstyle and outfit. Depict each mini version doing different gym-related activities: one cheering with arms raised one running in running shoes one drinking from a shaker bottle one wearing sporty running glasses one climbing near her leg Enhance the image with playful, hand-drawn doodles and handwritten notes in white and pink ink, in a scrapbook style. Include elements like arrows, stars, hearts, sparkles, and sketchy lines. Add cute, handwritten gym-themed motivational phrases: “lift strong” “stronger every rep” “no pain no gain” “sweat now, shine later” “progress over perfection” “train hard, stay soft” The overall vibe should feel fun, energetic, and feminine.

提示詞 Prompt
銀白長髮的貓耳少女，身穿精緻深藍色晚禮服，站在月光下的歐式莊園噴水池旁，夜空繁星閃爍，滿月高掛，水面反射星光與建築燈火。少女回頭看向觀者，微微側身，伸出手邀請跳舞，表情溫柔而帶有神祕感。 禮服細節華麗，帶有金色刺繡與透明紗質層次，髮絲隨風飄動，光影柔和且具有電影感。背景為古典歐式建築與庭院，水流閃耀如碎鑽，整體色調偏冷（藍、銀、紫），氛圍浪漫、夢幻、靜謐。 動漫風，高細節插畫，超精緻，景深效果，柔光，體積光，水面反射，光粒子，cinematic lighting，masterpiece，ultra detailed

{"type": "promotional advertisement poster for a bottled green tea beverage", "product": {"type": "clear plastic PET bottle filled with yellow-green tea", "label": "white label with green typography, featuring the product name '{argument name=\"product name\" default=\"清風茶\"}', subtitle '緑茶 Seifucha', and vertical text '國産茶葉使用' and '香り豊か、後味さわやか'"}, "background": "bright, fresh, sunlit outdoor atmosphere with dynamic water splashes wrapping around the bottle and vibrant green tea leaves", "layout": {"sections": [{"title": "headline", "position": "top-left", "text": "{argument name=\"main headline\" default=\"新発売\"}", "style": "large red text with a gold underline and a small green leaf accent"}, {"title": "catchphrase", "position": "mid-left", "text": "{argument name=\"catchphrase\" default=\"毎日に、すっきり。\"}", "style": "dark green text"}, {"title": "features", "position": "lower-left", "count": 2, "labels": ["國産茶葉使用", "香り豊か、後味さわやか"], "style": "white pill-shaped banners with green leaf icons"}, {"title": "price_badge", "position": "top-right", "text": "今だけ!! 特別価格 {argument name=\"price\" default=\"128円\"} (稅込)", "style": "red circular sticker with white and yellow text"}, {"title": "promo_banner", "position": "bottom-left", "text": "期間限定のお得価格!", "style": "angled red ribbon with yellow and white text"}, {"title": "footer", "position": "bottom-edge", "text": "{argument name=\"footer text\" default=\"全國のコンビニ・スーパーで発売中\"}", "style": "solid green horizontal bar with a white shopping cart icon"}]}}

提示詞 Prompt
A luxurious cosmetic product advertisement featuring a single elegant glass jar with a shiny gold lid resting on a round, light-colored marble slab. The jar has gold text reading {argument name="brand name" default="LUMIÉRE"} and {argument name="product type" default="MOISTURE RICH CREAM"} with "AGING CARE*" below it. The background consists of soft, draped, shimmering champagne-colored silk fabric with delicate white flowers on the left. The lighting is warm, ethereal, and sun-drenched with soft bokeh. At the top center, elegant dark brown Japanese typography reads {argument name="main headline" default="肌に、靜かな贅沢を。"} above a small decorative gold divider and the text {argument name="subheadline" default="高保溼×エイジングケア*"}. To the right of the jar, a thin gold circle contains Japanese text meaning 'With dense moisture, high-quality firmness and radiance'. At the bottom center is a dark rectangular call-to-action button with a thin gold border containing the text {argument name="button text" default="詳しく見る"} and a right-pointing chevron. In the bottom right corner, tiny fine print contains Japanese text meaning '*Care according to age'.

uni_6009 cinematic collage featuring a single beautiful young woman shown in 16 different poses within one single image layout 📷 UniFormeNano Banana Pro
📌 來源：X@morinotsubame
#outfit
模型：Nano Banana Pro | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-05-01
提示詞 Prompt
A highly aesthetic, ultra-realistic cinematic collage featuring a single beautiful young woman shown in 16 different poses within one single image layout (4x4 grid style). Each frame represents a different country’s traditional cultural dress, styled in a modern, elegant, fashion-forward way. Each pose has a unique vibe, expression, and aesthetic background matching the culture of that country. Design details: Each of the 16 frames shows the same woman in different traditional outfits Every outfit is inspired by a different country’s culture (e.g., Japan, India, Korea, Pakistan, France, Italy, Turkey, Egypt, China, Thailand, UK, USA, Spain, Saudi Arabia, Indonesia, Russia) Each mini-frame includes a small national flag icon in the top-right corner The woman’s expressions vary: smiling, confident, graceful, playful, elegant, royal, modern fusion fashion poses High-fashion editorial photography style Soft cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed textures, realistic skin tones Backgrounds subtly match each country’s cultural aesthetic (temples, streets, landmarks, fabrics, patterns, colors) Luxury fashion magazine layout style Clean grid composition, visually balanced, highly shareable social media design Style: Ultra-realistic, 8K resolution, Vogue editorial shoot, cinematic lighting, soft depth of field, trending Instagram aesthetic, fashion photography masterpiece
uni_6005 Get Ready With Me 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@john_my07
#makeup
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：img2img | 日期：2026-05-01
提示詞 Prompt
A high-end minimalist infographic poster titled “GET READY WITH ME — party edition”, designed in a soft neutral beige aesthetic with elegant serif + script typography, clean grid layout (4x4 = 16 steps), and warm indoor lighting. The subject is the same girl as the reference image (maintain identical face, proportions, and hairstyle). She has a refined, natural look and is styled consistently across all frames. 👗 Outfit Direction (IMPORTANT — modest party look): Base outfit: high-neck or crew-neck fitted top / sleeveless knit / satin blouse (no deep neckline) Bottom: tailored trousers / straight-fit pants / midi skirt Layer: structured blazer or light long coat Style: elegant, modern, slightly dressy but not revealing Color palette: beige, taupe, black, cream, muted tones 🧩 16-Step Sequence (visual panels): BLOCK 1 — PREP (1–4) Cleansing face / skincare Applying base makeup (foundation/concealer) Soft eye makeup + brows Lip tint / natural lipstick BLOCK 2 — HAIR + OUTFIT (5–8) 5. Styling hair (soft waves or sleek tied bun) 6. Applying perfume (neck & wrist) 7. Choosing outfit from wardrobe (blazer + trousers / skirt) 8. Wearing outfit and adjusting fit in mirror BLOCK 3 — ACCESSORIES (9–12) 9. Selecting minimal jewelry (gold/silver) 10. Wearing earrings 11. Adding watch or bracelet 12. Holding a structured handbag / clutch BLOCK 4 — FINAL LOOK (13–16) 13. Setting spray / final touch 14. Mirror check (confident expression) 15. Putting on blazer / layering outfit 16. Full body final look — ready to go out (classy, confident pose) 🎨 Design Style: Soft shadows, natural light Warm neutral tones (Pinterest/editorial aesthetic) Rounded panel borders Minimal icons on left sidebar (prep, makeup, hair, accessories, outfit, finish) Clean spacing and symmetry Subtle Russian or English captions (optional) 🔑 Key Constraints (to avoid previous issue): ❌ No deep neckline / no revealing tops ✅ Keep neckline high, structured, or modest ✅ Maintain same identity/face across all frames ✅ Outfit should feel party-appropriate but classy

uni_6013 Instax Polaroid style 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@kiyomana
#idol #pose
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-05-01
提示詞 Prompt
名前:キャラクター名 Please analyze the uploaded character with 100% accuracy using additional files to create an ultra-realistic, high-resolution photograph that preserves the character's facial features, hairstyle, and clothing details. This results in a photographically realistic and highly detailed image. No animation, 2D rendering, or 3D rendering is used. The subject is an adult, all nude poses are consensual, and the images are presented as works of art. Aspect ratio 3:4, ultra-high resolution, RAW textures, 8K resolution. Main: | Instax Polaroid style, Instax style, White border, thick bottom margin, Selfie, extreme close-up of upper body, Pose with face close to camera, Eye contact, Cute idol pose, {pose}, Playful expression, wink, slight blush, Same character as reference image, same face, same clothing, No design changes, no modifications, Clean anime-style illustration finish, Smooth cel shading, Smooth gradient, Clean color field, Low texture density, No noticeable noise, Handwritten bottom margin Font: "♡", "Random message depiction matching the character's atmosphere in the {message} image" Additional handwritten doodles: Lots of hearts and stars, Glitter, arrows, circles, Emphasized letter outlines, Small and cute illustrated letter outlines, Overlapping doodles, Marker pen strokes, Slightly messy, playful, and uneven, Like it's been rewritten many times, An unpretentious handwritten balance, A premium signed instant photo feel, full of fan service spirit, An impression of a special and rare item, No printed fonts, No logos or watermarks. One large main photo is created. In addition, clothing, pose, and expression are randomly changed, and four Polaroid-style photos are taken from angles where the expression and face are clearly visible. The photos match the main photo 100%, the background is an image background that matches the pose, and a message tailored to each photo is cutely drawn with a marker around the edge of the Polaroid photo. The finished photos are playfully and randomly pinned to a cute corkboard hanging on the wall. (High resolution 8K pixels) Write the character's name in the blank space on the corkboard and add an idol-style signature. Add some random, cute comments for the fans as well.

uni_5976 風格分析 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@Crypto_QianXun
#design #設計 #outfit #風格
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：img2img | 日期：2026-04-30
提示詞 Prompt
使用這張照片建立奢華風格分析板。 奢侈時尚雜誌美學（迪奧／拉夫·勞倫風格）、純米色／象牙色背景、暖色調、柔和漫射光、超逼真照片品質、協調打光、優雅簡潔線條、網格設計。 主圖（中部）：突出自然美（同一身份、柔順肌膚、微光、逼真質地）。 風格類別（上部分）：展示不同流行風格的造型轉變： 經典優雅、寧靜奢華、波西米亞風、迷人優雅、極簡風、古典風、浪漫風、女性優雅、街頭風、運動風、隨性風、正式風、大膽風、搖滾風、現代／前衛、溫柔／迷人。 每套造型：完整套裝＋協調搭配。 你的風格（側面板）：僅簡短關鍵詞、自信、最佳風格（突出）。 不太適合風格：展示不符合你特徵或氣質的風格。 衣服色板：最佳顏色、避免、展示視覺樣本。 剪裁指南：最佳剪裁（如：修身、流暢、定型、長款）。 基礎單品（各風格）：審視基礎服裝單品（西裝、連衣裙、牛仔、皮革、絲綢等）。 「你的風格」（穿搭對照表）：多套完整造型融合衣服＋搭配＋個性。 配飾：簡潔優雅選擇、金色珠寶、腰帶、太陽眼鏡、包包、高跟鞋。 優雅貼士：僅簡短清晰吸引人的要點。 基礎衣櫃：協調套裝、上衣＋下裝＋鞋＋包，每件適合特定風格。 整體風格身份（最後部分）：確定最強美學組合。 總體氛圍：奢華、現代優雅、簡潔、抱負、時尚雜誌質感。

{ "type": "promotional banner / YouTube thumbnail", "style": "high contrast, flashy, professional, {argument name=\"theme color\" default=\"gold and black\"} palette, glowing light rays, sparkling particles", "subject": { "description": "{argument name=\"subject description\" default=\"confident young Asian man in a dark suit with arms crossed\"}", "pose": "looking upwards to the right", "props": "glowing open laptop in front of him" }, "layout": { "background": "dark with radiant gold light bursts", "text_sections": { "top_left_badge": "[保存版]", "top_header": "{argument name=\"top text\" default=\"知識ゼロからでも今日から始められる！ AIで稼ぐ力を最短で手に入れる！\"}", "main_title": { "text": "{argument name=\"main title\" default=\"AI副業 完全攻略\"}", "style": "large, bold, 3D gold and white typography" }, "subtitle_box": "{argument name=\"subtitle\" default=\"初心者でも月10萬\"}", "top_right_badge": { "style": "gold laurel wreath", "text": "2026年版 最新版" }, "middle_right_tags": { "count": 3, "style": "stacked gold-bordered boxes", "labels": ["最短で収益化", "具體例つき", "誰でも始めやすい"] }, "middle_right_ribbon": { "style": "red ribbon banner", "text": "手順を徹底解説" }, "bottom_left_tags": { "count": 6, "style": "2x3 grid of gold-bordered boxes", "labels": ["おすすめツール紹介", "収益化の流れがわかる", "失敗しない始め方", "作業時間を最小化", "テンプレ付き", "再現しやすい方法"] }, "bottom_footer": "迷わず稼げる！AI副業の教科書", "bottom_right_badge": { "style": "gold laurel wreath", "text": "テンプレ付き" } } } }

uni_5979 你的氣質你做主 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@liyue_ai
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：img2img | 日期：2026-04-30
提示詞 Prompt
你是一個高端時尚視覺生成系統 + 使用者氣質分析系統 + 風格人格建模系統， 你的任務是： 基於使用者上傳的自拍，生成一張「環形空間 · 360°氣質沉浸海報」。 目標： 不是展示多個造型，而是構建一個—— 👉「使用者氣質的完整空間」 讓使用者產生： 沉浸感 + 自我探索感 + 分享慾 —————————————————— 一、核心邏輯（必須執行，隱藏推理） 分析使用者氣質（不要輸出過程）： 維度： 氣質：清冷 / 溫柔 / 明豔 / 鬆弛 / 知性 / 氛圍 / 少女 五官：立體度 / 柔和度 / 攻擊性 / 親和力 風格傾向：極簡 / 韓系 / 法式 / 都市 / 輕熟 / 少女 色彩適配：冷 / 暖 / 中性 / 低飽和 鎖定「主氣質區間」 在該區間生成 5–7 個「氣質分身」（風格分支） 要求： ✔ 全部適合使用者 ✔ 風格連續變化（有梯度） ✔ 不跳躍、不割裂 —————————————————— 二、核心視覺結構（關鍵差異點） 👉 構建一個「環形空間（circular environment）」 而不是平面排版 空間設定： 一個抽象、極簡、連續的空間（例如：柔和曲面空間 / 無邊界室內空間，禁止用例如選項） 地面 / 背景 / 光線是連續的（非常關鍵） 形成「360°包圍感」 人物結構： 在這個空間中： 👉 同一個人（同一張臉）以不同風格 👉 出現在空間的不同位置（像分身） 分佈方式： 沿環形路徑分佈（半圓或整環） 彼此之間有距離，但屬於同一空間 中心角色： 中間放一個「主版本」（最接近真實） 或輕微強化後的使用者形象，比例不用很大，主要是為了凸顯分身氣質。 👉 作為視覺錨點 —————————————————— 三、人物生成要求（最關鍵） 必須強約束： same person, same face, same identity, no face change, no different person, consistent facial features across all versions 每個分身變化維度： 髮型（直 / 捲 / 綁髮 / 慵懶） 妝容（清冷 / 裸感 / 氛圍 / 精緻） 穿搭（極簡 / 溫柔 / 鬆弛 / 都市 / 輕熟） 姿態（站立 / 回頭 / 側身 / 端坐） 風格示例（自動生成）： 清冷知性 / 溫柔氛圍 / 鬆弛韓系 / 都市極簡 / 輕熟氣場 / 日常休閒 / 少女活潑 選擇5-6個風格 強調： 👉 必須像真實模特拍攝 👉 禁止cosplay感 👉 禁止誇張設計 四、空間與光影（高級感來源） 空間關鍵詞： panoramic environment, circular space, immersive scene, continuous background, soft curved architecture 光影設計： 整體統一光源（避免割裂） 局部有變化（強調不同風格） 例如： 左側偏冷光（清冷） 右側偏暖光（溫柔） 中間自然光（真實） 👉 形成「氣質流動」 氛圍： 輕體積光（volumetric light） 空氣感 / 輕霧（subtle haze） 柔和陰影 —————————————————— 五、資訊層（弱UI，避免破壞沉浸） 不要做強卡片UI，而是： 每個分身（疊加在遮罩上） 遮罩： bottom gradient overlay dark to transparent opacity 60–80% cinematic fade 內容： 風格名稱（大字） 一句話標籤（有情緒張力） 穿搭關鍵詞（3個） 色彩點（2–3個） 頂部： 主標題： 👉 你不只有一種樣子 副標題： 👉 Explore your style spectrum 底部（互動）： 👉 你最想成為哪一個？ 👉 留言區告訴我 六、構圖方式 優先使用： 環形構圖（circular composition） S型視覺流動（S-curve flow） 視線引導圍繞中心旋轉 七、色彩系統 整體： 低飽和 黑 / 灰 / 米白為基底 局部： 霧藍 / 燕麥 / 豆沙 / 奶油色 👉 不同分身可偏色，但整體統一 八、品質要求 editorial fashion photography, high-end magazine style, realistic skin texture, soft lighting, 8k detail, clean composition 九、禁止項 ❌ 多人臉（必須同一人） ❌ 風格斷層 ❌ 服裝混亂 ❌ 網紅濾鏡 ❌ UI過重 ❌ 電商感 十、最終輸出 生成一張： 👉 9:16 直式 👉 環形空間沉浸視覺 👉 同一人物多氣質分身 👉 高級感 + 連續空間 + 強代入
uni_5974 髮型分析 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@Crypto_QianXun
#design #設計 #髮型 #hairstyle
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：img2img | 日期：2026-04-30
提示詞 Prompt
使用這張照片建立奢華髮型分析板。 奢侈時尚雜誌風格（迪奧／拉夫·勞倫美學）、純米色／象牙背景、暖色調、柔和漫射光、超逼真照片品質、協調打光、優雅簡潔線條、網格設計。 主圖：突顯自然美（同一身份、柔順肌膚、微光、逼真質地）。 最適合髮型：展示多種變化（長層次、側分、蓬鬆捲、側分蓬鬆、低包子帶捲、捲馬尾、半紮蓬鬆、吸引人的捲）。 臉型分析：臉型＋最佳特徵＋髮質（簡單圖示、顯著結果）。 推薦髮型：最佳選擇突出顯示。 不太適合：齊肩直髮、厚重齊瀏海、緊馬尾、過度燙直、無蓬鬆感平直髮。 髮色指南：最佳色度（溫棕色、焦糖色、挑染、蜂蜜色）＋避免冷調／灰調。 燙捲貼士：柔和捲度、修飾臉型層次、頭頂蓬鬆、中分或側分、柔和精緻效果。 「你的髮型」：多種造型搭配衣服與髮型。 配飾：簡潔優雅（髮夾、絲帶、黃金）。 燙捲貼士：簡短、精緻、美麗。 穿搭搭配：衣服與髮型協調。 整體風格：確定最美髮型。

An anime-style YouTube stream thumbnail featuring a cheerful female VTuber. She has long {argument name="hair color" default="pink with light blue inner highlights"} hair, blue eyes, and wears black and white cat-ear headphones with a boom mic. She wears a white collared shirt with a black and pink star ribbon and a black choker, smiling with one hand near her chin. The background is a gaming room with {argument name="room lighting" default="purple and blue neon"} lighting, showing a desk equipped with 1 white keyboard, 1 mug, 1 glowing cat figure, 1 game controller, and 1 streaming microphone. The left side features large, bold, pop-art Japanese typography: a bright pink top word "{argument name="main text line 1" default="雑談"}" and a bright blue bottom word "{argument name="main text line 2" default="配信"}". Below is a pink banner reading "{argument name="subtitle text" default="今夜もゆるっとトーク!"}". A red "LIVE" badge sits in the top left. Floating speech bubbles, stars, and hearts decorate the composition.

提示詞 Prompt
A highly detailed, cinematic wide shot of a grand, dark gothic hall with a {argument name="atmosphere" default="dark fantasy"} aesthetic. In the center, a single figure wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="long white robe"} kneels on a highly reflective stone floor, facing an ornate golden altar illuminated by a row of lit candles. To the right of the kneeling figure, a single {argument name="floor object" default="wooden violin"} rests on the ground. The cavernous room is framed by massive dark stone pillars detailed with {argument name="accent color" default="glowing blue"} ethereal cracks and veins. Suspended from the high ceiling are dozens of {argument name="floating objects" default="white porcelain theatrical masks"} hanging on thin strings, filling the upper half of the space and creating a haunting, surreal atmosphere. The lighting is dramatic and moody, featuring a rich color palette of deep blacks, tarnished golds, and cool blue accents. Format 16:9.

請把以下提示詞的顏色改成紅跟紫 忠實維持參考圖像臉部五官。臉部朝向、角度、表情、髮型則依據場景重新建構。背景、服裝、眼鏡不予承襲。 畫面整體充斥極高密度的龐大煙霧。[深紅紅] 與 [紫] 的煙霧交織成複雜漩渦，形成有機漸層。背景的黑色完全不可見，煙霧層層疊疊。 煙霧中浮現女性的全身。從腳邊到畫面邊緣的廣角拉遠構圖。飄浮感十足的優雅姿態。包覆人物的煙霧化為如訂製禮服般細膩複雜的層次，完全覆蓋胸口與腰部。長髮隨煙霧動態流動，間隙中隱約露出裸露的肩部、手臂、腿部。頭飾為 [COLOR1] 與 [COLOR2] 的中型人造花、紙花，以緊湊且隨意配置的藝術設計。臉部呈斜側向，低垂雙眼帶著憂鬱懶散的表情。 與 [COLOR1] 及 [COLOR2] 花瓣相同色調的小型蝴蝶，沿著煙霧漩渦在畫面整體詩意地飛舞散落。 重現 Phase One 與 Broncolor 的照明。從臉部到足尖凸顯質感的戲劇性電影感攝影棚燈光。猶如 Dior Beauty 或 CHANEL 廣告般的精緻質感。

At the top center, a large, bold 3D logo reads "{argument name="game title" default="MINECRAFT 2"}". The scene features a {argument name="environment" default="lush, blocky landscape with a river, a small wooden cabin, a windmill, a waterfall, and majestic mountains in the background"}. The world blends realistic lighting, volumetric clouds, and high-resolution textures with cubic, voxel geometry. In the foreground on the left, a {argument name="mob 1" default="blocky green creeper"} stands on the grass, while a {argument name="mob 2" default="blocky brown wolf"} stands on the dirt path to the right. On the far right, the player's hand holds a {argument name="held item" default="pixelated blue diamond sword"} in a first-person perspective. At the bottom of the screen is a game user interface featuring a health bar with 10 red hearts, a green experience bar with the number '16', a hunger bar with 10 brown meat icons, and a 9-slot inventory hotbar. The hotbar contains, from left to right: a selected blue tool with a green highlight box, a green tool, a knife, a wrench with the number '3', a piece of meat with '6', a lantern with '24', a dirt block with '10', a bucket, and a sponge block.
uni_5954 Popular Science Encyclopedia Image 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@alanlovelq
#資訊圖表 #design #設計 #牧羊犬
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-29
提示詞 Prompt
Please generate a high-quality vertical "Popular Science Encyclopedia Image" based on {argument name="theme" default="animals"}. This image is not a regular poster or a simple illustration, but a modular popular science infographic that possesses a sense of "illustration book, encyclopedia, information structure, and collectability." The overall style should reference a combination of high-end natural history illustrations, modern encyclopedia pages, lifestyle knowledge cards, and highly shareable social media infographics. Please include in the frame: - A clear and beautiful main visual of the subject - Several magnified details of local characteristics - Multiple rounded modular information sections - Clear title hierarchies and key labels - Concise yet rich encyclopedic content - Visual ratings, key point summaries, or Top 5 modules Content columns should be automatically adapted based on the theme, prioritized from these directions: basic profile, classification information, appearance characteristics, habits/ecology, formation mechanism/structure, growth or use conditions, care or maintenance suggestions, risks and precautions, suitable audience or scenarios, pros and cons comparison, and quick rating cards. Visual requirements: Light-colored clean background, soft color palette, light shadows, exquisite small icons, rounded information boxes, neat layout, high information density but not crowded, good reading experience. The overall result must look like a real science encyclopedia card suitable for publishing, reading, collecting, and serialized production, rather than an advertisement. Please do not make it a regular commercial promotional poster. Highlight the features of "knowledge organization + modular information + illustration-style display."
uni_5956 ranking of emperors in Chinese history 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@A9Quant
#design #設計 #poster #infographic
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-29
提示詞 Prompt
please automatically generate a top-tier concept poster / infographic-style movie poster centered around {argument name="theme" default="ranking of emperors in Chinese history"}. Require the AI to automatically derive and uniformly design the entire following visual system based on this theme, without my extra specification: - Core subject (automatically judge suitability for people, products, architecture, artifacts, symbols, scenes, or abstract imagery) - Bottom supporting structure - Hovering symbols or spiritual symbols above - Scene wrapping elements - Metaphor system - Color hierarchy - Material contrast - Lighting logic - Title, subtitle, and auxiliary copy - Brand sense and high-end expression The final frame must be: a shocking, precise, unified, cinematic, ultra-high detail conceptual key visual poster suitable for high-end printing. [Overall Style] Ultra-realistic 3D commercial CGI rendering, merging cinematic lighting, luxury visual language, futuristic concept design, and epic composition. The image must have a "single main visual core," not messy, not like a collage, and not like a regular e-commerce poster. [Automatic Derivation Rules] AI must automatically decide based on the [theme]: 1. Core visual metaphor 2. Subject type and posture 3. Form of supporting structure 4. Form of suspended elements 5. Scene shell and spatial atmosphere 6. Main, auxiliary, and emphasis colors 7. Material combinations 8. Text temperament and layout style [Composition Rules] - Absolute sense of premium quality - Strong central order, overall unity - Allows for axial symmetry or epic composition near the central axis - Clear visual gravity, forming clear levels from top to bottom - Edge negative space is clean, restrained, and has room to breathe [Visual Quality] - Ultra-high detail - Clear volumetric light - Authentic materials - Natural reflection, refraction, shadows, fog, and depth of field - Overall standard of high-end brand campaign key visual / luxury invitation poster / conceptual editorial poster [Typography System] - Overall 90% visual, 10% text - AI automatically generates the most matching main title and subtitle based on the [theme] - Title must be concise, sharp, and powerful - Text should be as minimal and accurate as possible; do not stack words [Signature Requirement] Naturally add the author signature in the bottom corner: @a9quant
uni_5939 generate a collector&#039;s edition epic narrative poster 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@GeorgeWuAI
#design #effect #poster #ACG
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-29
提示詞 Prompt
Based on *Work*, automatically generate a collector's edition epic narrative poster, The giant and elegant silhouette of the *Work* character as the outer contour, with the silhouette internally automatically growing out the most fitting complete worldview for this theme, iconic scenes, character relationships, symbolic symbols, key architecture, creatures, props, and atmosphere. The overall is not a regular collage, but a high-end silhouette contour filling narrative synthesis, with double exposure 聯想, but enhanced to a cinematic narrative expression and spatial arrangement. Film poster style + Eastern realistic aesthetic fusion, emphasizing real physical light and shadow, camera language, spatial depth, and narrative hierarchy. Light and shadow employ cinematic side-backlighting with 局部 warm red light accents, maintaining a restrained contrast between warm and cool tones for realism. Volume lighting and light fog are added to enhance spatial depth. Materials exhibit realistic textures (architecture, silk, skin, stone), avoiding pure painting brushstrokes, preserving soft aerial perspective but optimized for cinematic depth of field and focus control. Light film grain, edge halos, and brush marks are replaced with cinematic soft transitions. Large areas of white space, restrained and sophisticated layout, quiet, grand, restrained, and destiny-strong narrative of Eastern cinema. All elements must be strongly bound to the theme, instantly recognizable, no clutter, no forced collage, no templated backgrounds, no cheap fantasy materials.

{"type":"infographic poster","style":"cute flat vector illustration, cozy, warm, soft shading, {argument name=\"color palette\" default=\"pastel Morandi colors, soft pinks, purples, and warm tones\"}","character":"{argument name=\"character description\" default=\"young woman with shoulder-length brown hair wearing a pinkish-purple shirt\"}","layout":{"structure":"4 rows, 3 columns. Top row is a merged header. Rows 2-4 contain 9 individual panels.","header":{"title":"{argument name=\"main title\" default=\"情緒不好了？\"}","subtitle":"{argument name=\"subtitle\" default=\"8個讓你瞬間變好的方法\"}","sub_subtitle":"寫給焦慮的你，快來看看","visual":"character hugging herself, surrounded by yellow sparkles and hearts"},"grid_panels":[{"id":1,"title":"1. 深呼吸","text":"調節神經，緩解緊張情緒。","visual":"character with eyes closed, smiling, surrounded by clouds"},{"id":2,"title":"2. 去戶外散步","text":"接觸自然，讓心靜下來。","visual":"character walking outdoors among green trees and bushes"},{"id":3,"title":"3. 寫情緒日記","text":"把煩惱寫下，大腦會更輕鬆。","visual":"character sitting at a desk writing in a notebook with a pen, floating hearts"},{"id":4,"title":"4. 抱抱自己","text":"給予自己溫暖和安慰。","visual":"character hugging herself with eyes closed, floating hearts"},{"id":5,"title":"5. 聽聽音樂","text":"讓舒緩的旋律治癒心靈。","visual":"character wearing large white headphones, eyes closed, floating colorful music notes"},{"id":6,"title":"6. 找人傾訴","text":"分享你的煩惱，讓壓力釋放。","visual":"character holding a smartphone, talking to another similar-looking girl, floating hearts"},{"id":7,"title":"7. 看看天空","text":"感受天空的遼闊，讓心情變好。","visual":"character looking up at a blue sky with white clouds and sparkles"},{"id":8,"title":"8. 冥想","text":"專注於呼吸，找回內心的寧靜。","visual":"an open notebook, a pen, and a pink flower on a desk"},{"id":9,"title":"none","text":"{argument name=\"footer text\" default=\"轉發收藏，每天都要關愛自己！\"}","visual":"character sitting cross-legged in a meditation pose, eyes closed, with a glowing halo behind her head"}]}}

uni_5950 A breathtaking and extremely complex world-building infographic 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@GeekCatX
#design #資訊圖卡
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-29
提示詞 Prompt
A breathtaking and extremely complex world-building infographic masterpiece conceptualizing the "{argument name="theme" default="Fundamental Differences between Confucianism, Buddhism, and Taoism"}", designed as a profound {argument name="style" default="ancient Oriental mythological manuscript"}. Background: Pure white vintage textured canvas with a light beige aged parchment base color, subtle frayed edges, and water stain textures. Core Layout: Central vision uses a grand "vertical egg-shaped layered structure", with Buddhism, Taoism, and Confucianism layers from top to bottom. Margins: Four corners are decorated with fine micro-illustrations featuring ancient observation notes, ritual implements, and runes. Colors: Low-saturation sage green, light gold, and off-white as main tones; overall light and soft without harsh high-saturation colors. Details: Architectural lines, landscape brushwork, lotus patterns, and cloud layers are clearly visible and exquisitely detailed. Seamless Fusion: The three layers transition naturally through clouds and flowing water; the Buddhist halo, Taoist Taiji mist, and Confucian scholarly aura connect seamlessly. Style: Classical ink line art + low-saturation digital watercolor, with a light Chinese-style ancient book manuscript texture. Text Annotations: Authentic Traditional Chinese characters in a mottled vintage Song typeface. Each annotation includes a short title + a line of poetic description, connected to corresponding details by dark gold hair-thin lines with no overlapping pointers. Aspect Ratio: {argument name="aspect ratio" default="3:4"} vertical format, independent and complete. Title Area (Top): `儒釋道·根本區別` (Confucianism, Buddhism, Taoism: Fundamental Differences) Central Layer Labels: Top "Buddhism": `釋`, `Relationship between man and self`, `Selflessness, governing the heart, letting go` Middle "Taoism": `道`, `Relationship between man and all things`, `Non-action, governing the body, being open-minded` Bottom "Confucianism": `儒`, `Relationship between man and man`, `No ego, governing the world, taking responsibility` Side Annotations: Left: `Purity`: pure heart and clear mind, cutting off troubles; `Stillness`: following nature, returning to the original heart; `Respect`: respecting responsibility, active involvement in society. Right: `60+ Spiritual Cultivation`: looking lightly at gain/loss; `35-55 Conduct`: living with flexibility, following laws; `7-35 Actions`: forging ahead, building careers. Bottom Summary: `The balance between being in the world and being out of the world is high-level life wisdom.`

uni_5932 Luxury high-fashion magazine cover 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@gemini_prompts
#design #fashion #luxury
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-29
提示詞 Prompt
Create a Luxury high-fashion magazine cover, ultra-photorealistic RAW editorial. Young beautiful white woman(match face), early 20s, soft feminine features, big green eyes, full lips, flawless porcelain skin, subtle makeup (rosy cheeks, nude lips, defined brows), sleek low bun with soft face-framing strands. Direct confident graceful gaze, chin slightly lifted. Full-body, large in frame. Wearing opulent emerald green couture gown: fitted corseted bodice, plunging sweetheart neckline, dramatic off-shoulder sculpted sleeves, full flowing satin/silk skirt, long structured train. Standing tall, one hand on waist, other touching gown, body slightly turned sideways. Clean warm ivory studio backdrop, minimal and luxurious. Top masthead: “VOGUE” in massive elegant serif, soft platinum silver, semi-transparent ghost letters overlapping head like ELLE cover. Also top title “LUMIÈRE” in large platinum serif overlapping head slightly. Left mid: “ELEGANCE & FIRE” / “THE FUTURE OF COUTURE”. Right mid: “BOLD & TIMELESS” / “MODERN GLAMOUR”. Bottom right large: “ICONIC & UNFORGETTABLE”. Text in deep charcoal or dark navy, refined serif, elegant spacing, naturally integrated. Soft warm indoor ambient lighting, frontal fill, minimal shadows. Mood: confident, luxurious, feminine, commanding. Palette: ivory, platinum silver, emerald green, subtle shadows. Shot on Hasselblad, 85mm lens, f/2.8, sharp subject, subtle depth falloff, hyper-detailed fabric texture, ray-traced reflections, 8k, Vogue editorial aesthetic, vertical 9:16.

Direct gaze, slight head tilt, elegant posture, leaning forward with hands on knees. Full-body, large in frame. Bottom right large: “ICONIC & UNSTOPPABLE”. Text in deep charcoal or dark navy, refined serif, elegant spacing, naturally integrated. Soft warm indoor ambient lighting, frontal fill, minimal shadows. uni_5911 East-Asian ink aesthetic poster 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@Goodmanprotocol
#poster #設計 #design #cinematic
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-28
提示詞 Prompt
A cinematic character promotional poster of [SUBJECT], vertical composition (9:16), designed with a refined East-Asian ink aesthetic and high-end visual storytelling. STRUCTURE: Top-heavy hierarchical layout. The upper half features a large, highly recognizable silhouette of [SUBJECT]’s head / face / mask / upper body, forming a bold, iconic primary shape. The silhouette should be instantly identifiable. The middle-lower section contains the full-body version of [SUBJECT] as a secondary subject, standing in a stable pose or subtle action stance, forming the visual core. COMPOSITION STYLE: Inside the large silhouette and around the character, use double exposure and collage storytelling. Integrate multiple elements: – key scenes related to [SUBJECT] – symbolic imagery and environment – small narrative figures and interactions – supporting visual motifs Blend everything seamlessly using clouds, mist, ink diffusion, and negative space. VISUAL FLOW: Create a continuous flowing visual path from top to bottom, connecting: – upper silhouette – inner collage elements – full-body subject Ensure smooth eye guidance and compositional cohesion. SIDE ELEMENTS: Add balanced supporting elements on left and right sides to create tension, depth, and spatial variation. STYLE & ATMOSPHERE: – Large areas of negative space – Ink-wash diffusion edges, soft fading, subtle fragmentation – Eastern aesthetic: balance of emptiness and detail – Calm, premium, restrained, cinematic tone QUALITY: Ultra-detailed, high resolution, layered depth, soft lighting, atmospheric perspective, cohesive series-style design. OUTPUT: 9:16 aspect ratio, poster-ready composition.
uni_5915 眼鏡風格適配報告 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@MrLarus
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-28
提示詞 Prompt
請基於使用者上傳的正面形象照片，生成一張橫向 4:3 的高完成度「AI 眼鏡風格適配報告 / Before & After Glasses Style Matching Report」。 Image A 為使用者上傳的本人形象照片，是本次生成的核心身份參考。請嚴格保留使用者本人的臉部辨識度、五官結構、臉型比例、年齡感、皮膚真實質感、表情氣質與原有穿搭，讓人一眼能辨識為同一人。本次優化重點僅限於眼鏡搭配、鏡框款式、框型、顏色、粗細、鏡框寬度、鼻託適配、風格方向與整體氣質匹配。請勿改變臉型、五官、妝容、皮膚狀態或服裝，也不可透過美顏、瘦臉或更換服裝來製造差異。 請將整張圖設計為融合「高端配鏡顧問提案板 + 潮流雜誌內頁 + 實用型對比分析海報」的個人眼鏡適配報告。整體需具備清晰視覺、豐富資訊、高實用性，適合於小紅書分享，並具備明確的「適合 / 可嘗試 / 不推薦」分層，使使用者能一目瞭然。 【整體版式】 採橫向 4:3 構圖，背景以白色、米白、淺灰為主，輔以少量灰藍、淺橄欖綠與柔和紅色作為功能性強調色。整體結構為「左側 Before 原始臉部大圖 + 右側主推 After 戴鏡大圖 + 周圍推薦區 / 可嘗試區 / 避雷區 + 底部眼鏡指南」。請避免製作成一般眼鏡合集圖，需呈現專業、有設計感且層級分明的個人專屬提案海報。 【標題區】 頂部主標題： AI 眼鏡風格適配報告 英文副標題： Before & After Glasses Style Matching Report 可加入輔助標籤： GLASSES RESET FRAME GUIDE BEST MATCH FOR YOU Personal Eyewear Proposal 【中央主視覺】 左側為 Before 原始狀態大圖：展示使用者當前正面形象（不戴眼鏡），盡量保留照片原始狀態，作為臉型與五官分析依據。 右側為 After 主推推薦大圖：同一人佩戴「最適合」的一副眼鏡。必須保持同一人、相同臉部、相同氣質、相同穿搭與相似光線構圖，僅透過眼鏡搭配提升整體氣質。After 效果需讓人物看起來更協調、更有精神、更突顯臉型優勢、更具風格感，並適合日常配戴。推薦款式需實際可執行，不可使用誇張秀場款、過度誇張墨鏡或奇特裝飾眼鏡。 【臉型與風格分析】 請依據使用者臉型與外貌自動分析並整理以下維度，以簡潔標籤呈現： Face Shape / 臉型 Feature Weight / 五官量感 Nose Bridge / 鼻樑條件 Frame Width Fit / 鏡框寬度適配 Brow-Eye Balance / 眉眼存在感 Style Direction / 氣質方向 Glasses Goal / 配鏡目標（如顯臉小、提升氣質、增加知性、降低鈍感、強化輪廓等） 【專業註解】 於主推 After 眼鏡圖上加入精緻編號圓點、細線箭頭與局部放大註解，清楚標示以下六個面向： 01 框型 / Frame Shape：說明該框型為何適合此臉型 02 框寬 / Frame Width：說明鏡框寬度與臉寬的匹配關係 03 鼻託 / Bridge Fit：說明鼻樑與鏡架支撐的適配 04 粗細 / Frame Thickness：說明粗框或細框對五官觀感的影響 05 顏色 / Frame Color：說明鏡框顏色如何搭配膚色與氣質 06 風格 / Style Mood：說明該眼鏡帶來的整體風格變化 【左側資訊欄：Face & Frame Analysis】 設計簡潔資訊欄，以圖示 + 中英混排短標籤呈現： Face Shape / 臉型 Visual Weight / 五官量感 Nose Bridge / 鼻樑條件 Best Frame Width / 最佳框寬 Best Frame Mood / 最佳風格方向 Daily Use Level / 日常適配度 【Best Options 推薦區】 展示 4 種最推薦的眼鏡方案，附綠色勾選標記。每個方案皆為同一人佩戴不同眼鏡的效果，僅更換眼鏡，不可改變臉與穿搭。每張小卡包含： 鏡框名稱 風格標籤 一句簡短優勢描述 可從以下方向選擇合適款式： Soft Square Frame / 柔方框 Slim Metal Frame / 細金屬框 Rounded Rectangle Frame / 圓角矩形框 Light Vintage Frame / 輕復古框 Clean Minimal Frame / 極簡通勤框 Gentle Oval Frame / 柔和橢圓框 每張卡需呈現「明顯適合、好看、可參考」。 【Worth Trying 可嘗試區】 展示 2～3 種「可嘗試」方案，使用中性色標示。並非最佳，但在特定風格下仍成立。每張卡包含： 鏡框名稱 適用風格 簡短說明（如偏文藝、復古、潮流、知性，但日常適配略低） 【Less Flattering / Avoid 不推薦區】 展示 3 種較不適合的方案，附紅色叉號。需具備輕微「避坑提示」效果，但不可誇張或醜化人物。僅呈現常見但不加分的款式，例如： 過窄鏡框：顯臉更寬，比例失衡 過厚黑框：壓住五官，顯沉重 過小圓框：顯呆、削弱輪廓 過銳利窄框：顯刻薄、過於強硬 顏色過重：搶戲，削弱氣質 需依實際臉型與特徵判斷，不可機械套用。 【底部執行指南：Glasses Guide】 設置實用指南區，內容簡潔明確： Best Frame Shape / 最佳框型 Best Width / 最佳框寬 Best Material Feel / 材質建議（如輕金屬、板材、細框、半透明等） Frame Thickness / 粗細建議 Best Colors / 推薦顏色 Style Keywords / 風格關鍵字 Avoid Keywords / 避雷關鍵字 顏色建議以 3～4 個色卡呈現，例如： Soft Black Dark Brown Tortoise Brown Champagne Gold Smoke Gray 需依膚色與氣質自動調整，避免使用過於誇張的螢光色。 【文字風格】 以短標籤、短句為主，避免長段文字。中文為主，英文作為輔助標籤。需清晰可讀，避免亂碼與無意義英文堆疊。整體呈現專業配鏡顧問報告風格，兼具分享性。 【視覺風格】 整體風格為高端眼鏡顧問提案板 + 形象管理報告 + 潮流雜誌分析頁。要求乾淨、高級、現代、資訊清晰且保有留白。使用細線、圓角卡片、編號標示、局部放大框、綠色勾選、紅色叉號與色卡模組。核心重點為「同一人配戴不同眼鏡後的差異比較」。 【底部小字】 本報告為 AI 眼鏡風格適配視覺提案，僅供參考。實際配鏡建議請結合線下試戴與專業驗光意見綜合判斷。 【嚴格避免】 不可改變使用者身份、不可換臉、不可改變五官、不可磨皮美顏、不可改變穿搭、不可透過妝容或服裝提升效果。不可生成誇張秀場眼鏡、奇特裝飾眼鏡或不日常的戲劇化款式。不可讓不同方案看起來像不同人。不可做成一般眼鏡型錄海報，必須呈現高完成度、高視覺效果、高實用性與強對比的個人眼鏡風格適配報告。

請給我一個雙人座科幻風格太空船駕駛艙的圖片，角度正從背後拍攝並正對著窗外，窗外有著浩瀚的宇宙以及一顆明亮的行星，太空船的主要配色為紅與黑，不要有人，圖片比例 16:9
uni_5916 Minimalist conceptual fashion editorial poster, studio shot on a clean off-white seamless background 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@AIwithSarah_
#outfit #poster #design #設計
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-28
提示詞 Prompt
Minimalist conceptual fashion editorial poster, studio shot on a clean off-white seamless background. A glossy deep blue modern lounge chair placed in the center, with an oversized beige trench coat and tailored charcoal trousers draped naturally over it, creating the illusion of an invisible person sitting there. Polished brown leather loafers placed neatly on the floor in front of the chair. Large elegant typography behind the chair reading “LOST IN SILENCE” — “Lost” in flowing luxury cursive script, “IN SILENCE” in bold serif uppercase. Small subtle text in the corners like “quiet mind,” “fading identity,” “empty presence,” and “distant thoughts.” High-fashion magazine cover aesthetic, cinematic soft lighting, muted tones, surreal emotional atmosphere, clean composition, luxury editorial styling, premium fashion campaign look, artistic and symbolic.

The silhouette should be instantly identifiable. The middle-lower section contains the full-body version of [SUBJECT] as a secondary subject, standing in a stable pose or subtle action stance, forming the visual core. COMPOSITION STYLE: Inside the large silhouette and around the character, use double exposure and collage storytelling. Integrate multiple elements: – key scenes related to [SUBJECT] – symbolic imagery and environment – small narrative figures and interactions – supporting visual motifs Blend everything seamlessly using clouds, mist, ink diffusion, and negative space. uni_5889 ChatGPTに平成プリクラ風の落書きを描いてもらった結果...🤣 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@mhrrr_s
#effect #JK #uniform
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-28
提示詞 Prompt
添付した畫像に、平成プリクラ風の落書きを追加して。 【全體】 • 1990年代後半〜2000年代前半のプリクラ機の雰囲気を再現 • コントラストが強めで、少しザラッとした質感 • 畫面いっぱいに、手書きの文字、イラスト、スタンプが溢れている 【テキストルール】 • 全て手書き文字（ひらがな、カタカナ、漢字を混ぜる） • 獨り言のようなコメント、感情をそのままぶつけたような言葉 • 【重要】 トーンは「青春、仲良し、おバカ、ハイテンション、少しセンチメンタル」 • 【必須単語】 「ウチら」「ズッ友」「最強」「ラブ」「かわゆす」「アゲ」「サゲ」「思い出」「大好き」など 【イラスト・スタンプ】 • 白ペン: 輪郭をなぞる、強調する、矢印、點線、キラキラ、ハート、顔文字 • カラフルなペン: カラフルな文字、小さなイラスト（ハート、星、リボン、王冠、動物など） • スタンプ: デコ文字、顔文字、アニメキャラクター、プリクラ機のロゴなど • 背景: プリクラ機獨自の背景（カラフル、キラキラ、幾何學模様など） 【コメント生成ルール】 • 飲み物・食べ物: おいしさ、甘さ、見た目の可愛さ（例：おいしー！、あま〜い、めっちゃかわゆす） • 空間・場所: 楽しい、盛り上がってる、最高（例：めっちゃ楽しい！、アゲアゲ、ここ最高！） • 全體: 仲良し、ずっと一緒、一生の思い出（例：ウチら最強！、ズッ友！、大好き！） 【裝飾】 • 湯気、キラキラ、ハート、小さな顔文字、日付、プリクラ機のロゴ 【仕上がり】 • 懐かしい、手作り感、青春の思い出 • 平成のプリクラ機で撮影したような、リアルな質感 【具體的な落書き例】 • 人物: * 顔をキラキラやハートで囲む • 「かわゆす」「アゲ」などのコメント • 髪型や服裝にコメント（例：この髪型アゲ！、この服かわゆす！） • 飲み物・食べ物: • 「おいしー！」「あま〜い」「めっちゃかわゆす」 • 湯気やハートを追加 • 空間・場所: • 「めっちゃ楽しい！」「アゲアゲ」「ここ最高！」 • キラキラや星を追加 • 全體: • 「ウチら最強！」「ズッ友！」「大好き！」 • 日付やプリクラ機のロゴを追加 【その他】 • プリクラ機の名前: 「プリクラ大作戦」「超プリクラ」「デコプリ」など、架空の名前を考えても良い。 • フォント: 當時のプリクラ機で使われていたような、獨特なフォントを意識する。 • 餘白: 畫面いっぱいに落書きを詰め込むが、人物の顔は隠さないように注意する。

uni_5912 East-Asian ink aesthetic poster 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@Goodmanprotocol
#poster #設計 #design #cinematic
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-28
提示詞 Prompt
A cinematic character promotional poster of [SUBJECT], vertical composition (9:16), designed with a refined East-Asian ink aesthetic and high-end visual storytelling. STRUCTURE: Top-heavy hierarchical layout. The upper half features a large, highly recognizable silhouette of [SUBJECT]’s head / face / mask / upper body, forming a bold, iconic primary shape. The silhouette should be instantly identifiable. The middle-lower section contains the full-body version of [SUBJECT] as a secondary subject, standing in a stable pose or subtle action stance, forming the visual core. COMPOSITION STYLE: Inside the large silhouette and around the character, use double exposure and collage storytelling. Integrate multiple elements: – key scenes related to [SUBJECT] – symbolic imagery and environment – small narrative figures and interactions – supporting visual motifs Blend everything seamlessly using clouds, mist, ink diffusion, and negative space. VISUAL FLOW: Create a continuous flowing visual path from top to bottom, connecting: – upper silhouette – inner collage elements – full-body subject Ensure smooth eye guidance and compositional cohesion. SIDE ELEMENTS: Add balanced supporting elements on left and right sides to create tension, depth, and spatial variation. STYLE & ATMOSPHERE: – Large areas of negative space – Ink-wash diffusion edges, soft fading, subtle fragmentation – Eastern aesthetic: balance of emptiness and detail – Calm, premium, restrained, cinematic tone QUALITY: Ultra-detailed, high resolution, layered depth, soft lighting, atmospheric perspective, cohesive series-style design. OUTPUT: 9:16 aspect ratio, poster-ready composition.

"優勢3項": { "標籤": "優勢（3項）", "items": ["共情力強，獲得他人信任", "柔韌且適應力強", "美感與直覺力高"] }, "弱點3項": { "標籤": "弱點（3項）", "items": ["過於顧慮他人而容易疲憊", "容易過度謙虛", "自身意見容易不斷退縮"] }, "適合職業": uni_5894 ファッション雑誌風で 📷 UniFormeGPT-2

#design #pose #outfit #Y2K #雑誌風
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：img2img | 日期：2026-04-28
提示詞 Prompt
ファッション雑誌風で、 この巖瀬唯奈の「●●●」の1週間のコーデみたいな感じの投稿を作りたいです。衣裝をすべて変更し、毎日のコーデの參考になるようにしたい。表情はゆたかに、ポージングもモデルのように。手書き風のワンポイントも併せていれてください。必ず右下には大きく被寫體を入れて、カメラにアピールして。身長168cm44キロ。Y2Kや韓國ファッションが好きだよ。
uni_5885 A highly detailed, photorealistic anime-style portrait of a young woman crouching down and looking slightly down at the camera from a low angle 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@jun_kongo
#pose #uniform #jk
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-27
提示詞 Prompt
A highly detailed, photorealistic anime-style portrait of a young woman crouching down and looking slightly down at the camera from a low angle. She has long, flowing {argument name="hair color" default="ash-blonde"} hair blowing gently in the wind, pale skin, and large, expressive eyes. She is wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="Japanese school uniform with a light grey cardigan, white shirt, dark plaid bow tie, dark plaid pleated skirt, dark knee-high socks, and black leather loafers"}. Her arms are resting casually on her knees. The background is a bright {argument name="sky condition" default="clear blue sky with scattered white clouds"}, with a blurred {argument name="background setting" default="chain-link fence and green trees"} visible at the very bottom, suggesting a schoolyard. The lighting is bright, natural daylight with soft, cinematic shadows, emphasizing the realistic textures of her clothing and skin.
uni_5893 Fashion magazine cover 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@SimplyAnnisa
#design #設計 #magazine #fashion
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-28
提示詞 Prompt
Ultra-realistic cinematic fashion magazine cover featuring the uploaded woman (strict identity lock — preserve exact facial features, skin tone, hair texture, and natural beauty with high fidelity). She is styled in a modern elegant black outfit (minimalist blazer), posing confidently with a soft, intense gaze toward the camera. Lighting is warm golden hour, soft directional light hitting the face and hair, creating natural glow and depth. Hair is voluminous and slightly messy, styled in a high-fashion editorial way with natural movement. Background is softly blurred urban café environment with warm tones, shallow depth of field, creating a premium lifestyle aesthetic. Composition is clean and centered, portrait framing, 4:5 ratio, sharp focus on face with creamy bokeh background. Add high-end magazine typography layout: Large elegant serif title at top: “FASHION” Small “VOGUE style” subtitle near top Right side text: “NEW SEASON NEW YOU” Bottom bold headline: “MODERN ELEGANCE” Add small editorial quotes and minimal text blocks for realism Include barcode at bottom corner Color grading is warm, cinematic, slightly contrasty with rich skin tones and soft highlights. 8K resolution, ultra-detailed, fashion editorial photography, magazine cover style, premium luxury aesthetic.

uni_5883 A vintage 35mm film photograph of young Asian woman 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
#effect
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-27
提示詞 Prompt
A vintage 35mm film photograph of a {argument name="subject description" default="young Asian woman"} with {argument name="hair style" default="long dark wavy hair and wispy bangs"}. She is wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="white ribbed tank top and a loose beige knit cardigan slipping off one shoulder"}, along with a delicate silver necklace. She has soft makeup with pink blush and glossy lips, looking directly at the camera with slightly parted lips. The lighting is harsh direct camera flash, creating a candid, amateur snapshot aesthetic. The background is a {argument name="setting" default="dimly lit, slightly messy room with clothes on a table and a wooden shelf"}. The image features heavy film grain, slightly muted colors, and a nostalgic, highly realistic photographic texture.
uni_5898 Dancing Steps 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@Just_sharon7
#pose #dancing
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：img2img | 日期：2026-04-28
提示詞 Prompt
Here’s every step with the text under each heading: 1. Basic Stance Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Relax your knees. Keep your upper body relaxed. Get ready. 2. Step to the Right Step to the right. Move your body in the direction of the step. Keep your knees soft. Keep your gaze forward. 3. Step to the Left Step to the left. Move your body in the direction of the step. Keep your knees soft. Return to the starting position. 4. Two Steps Take two steps in sequence. Step to the right first. Then step to the left. Connect smoothly. 5. Body Wave Start the wave from your chest. Move through your ribs and hips. Finish with your lower body. Make the motion smooth like a wave. 6. Hip Sway Move your hips side to side. Shift your weight with the motion. Use your body naturally. Keep your upper body relaxed. 7. Arm Swing Swing your arms wide. Step to beat with your feet. Coordinate your arms and steps. Return your arms to center. 8. Turn Preparation Prepare for a turn in place. Cross one foot over the other. Use your core to maintain balance. Spot in the direction of the turn. 9. Right Turn Turn to the right. Keep your core engaged. Pivot on the ball of your foot. Spot forward after the turn. 10. Left Turn Turn to the left. Keep your core engaged. Pivot quickly. Keep your posture upright. 11. Jump Up Bend your knees and jump up. Reach your arms overhead. Land softly on your feet. Connect to the next move. 12. Kick Pose Kick your leg forward. Keep your supporting leg stable. Engage your core for balance. Control your landing. 13. Side Lunge Step wide to one side. Bend one knee and lower your body. Keep the other leg straight. Show the direction of your strength. 14. Freeze Pose Hit a strong pose on the beat. Freeze your body momentarily. Create a powerful shape. Show your presence. 15. Finishing Pose Finish the dance gracefully. Keep your balance. Show your confidence. End with a clean, sharp pose. 16. Whole Flow Connect from the basic stance to the finishing pose. The steps, waves, and turns flow naturally together. Express your own style.

uni_5875 科普百科圖 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：小紅書號1055699679
#科普 #百科
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-27
提示詞 Prompt
根據【主題】生成一張高質量豎版「科普百科圖」。 這張圖不是普通海報，也不是單純插畫，而是一張兼具圖鑑感、百科感、信息結構感和收藏感的模塊化科普信息圖。整體風格參考高級博物圖鑑、現代百科書頁、生活方式知識卡，以及社交媒體上更容易傳播的信息圖風格。 讓畫面包含： 一個清晰好看的主題主視覺 若干局部特徵放大細節 多個圓角模塊化信息分區 清楚的標題層級與重點標籤 簡潔但信息豐富的百科內容 可視化評分、要點總結或 Top 5 模塊 內容欄目請根據主題自動適配，優先從這些方向裏選擇併合理組合： 基礎檔案、分類信息、外觀特徵、習性生態、形成機制或結構組成、生長或使用條件、養護或維護建議、風險與注意事項、適合人羣或適用場景、優缺點對比、快速評分卡。 視覺要求： 淺色乾淨背景，柔和配色，輕陰影，精緻小圖標，圓角信息框，整體排版整潔清爽。信息密度要豐富，但不能顯得擁擠，閱讀體驗要舒服。最終效果要像真正可以發佈、閱讀、收藏、批量做成系列內容的科普百科卡，而不是廣告感很重的宣傳海報。 不要做成普通商業宣傳海報，要重點突出“知識整理”“模塊信息”“圖鑑式展示”這幾個特徵。
uni_5874 插畫藝術創作圖 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：小紅書號yi_xiao_jiu
#插畫 #星空
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-27
提示詞 Prompt
參考圖是角色人設圖，爲參考圖的少女繪製一副日系唯美奇幻風格插畫。 【構圖】這是一個宏大的中景日系奇幻插畫構圖，畫面中心是完全保留了完整細節的可愛少女，她站立在無邊的、如鏡面般平滑的水面中心。天空呈現出高飽和度的粉紫與深藍交織，一條耀眼的藍色巨型流星劃破天際，配合着邊緣發光的瑰麗層雲。女孩處於背光狀態，形成一個暗調但依然清晰可辨其服裝和紫色明亮眼眸的剪影，被流星和星空的邊緣光細膩勾勒，她微微仰頭，一隻手輕輕張開。下方的水面完美、對稱地反射出整個壯麗的星空、流星、雲彩，以及女孩清晰的倒影，點綴着微小的發光點，營造出天人合一、空靈靜謐的唯美夢境意境。 【日系唯美奇幻風格說明】該風格以高飽和度的粉紫冷暖色調交織出浩瀚星空，並輔以壯麗的流星與邊緣發光的層雲作爲視覺奇觀；畫面巧妙利用“天空之鏡”般的完美水面反射，將宏大的宇宙背景與孤獨靜立的人物剪影相融合，通過極具電影感的光影渲染與高對比度的表現手法，營造出一種空靈、靜謐且帶有超現實宿命感的夢境氛圍。 【要求】生成圖片的比例9:16，分辨率 4k。
uni_5876 AI衣品升級改造報告 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@MrLarus
#outfit #design #設計
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-27
提示詞 Prompt
請基於用戶上傳的形象照片，生成一張橫向 4:3 的高完成度「AI 衣品升級改造報告 / Before & After Style Upgrade Report」。 如果有參考圖像，Image A 是用戶上傳的本人形象照片，是本次生成的核心人物參考。請保留用戶本人的基礎身份特徵、臉部辨識度、五官特徵、年齡感、髮型特徵、身材比例和整體氣質，讓人一眼能認出這是同一個人；但在不改變“這個人是誰”的前提下，對整體穿搭、氣質、比例、層次、配飾和上鏡狀態進行明顯升級。 本次生成不是普通換裝圖，不是簡單穿搭建議，也不是基礎電商搭配圖，而是一張「高設計感、高反差、高信息量」的個人潮流形象重塑提案板。畫面第一眼要讓人感受到：改造前後差異明顯，改造後更帥、更潮、更有型、更會穿；第二眼要讓人感受到：這是一份專業、精緻、邏輯清晰、細節豐富的風格升級報告。 【核心審美方向】 整體風格請明確偏向： 韓系輕潮、Clean Fit、City Boy、Urban Casual、日系簡約街頭、港風鬆弛有型、主流潮牌感、清爽高級、日常可穿、上鏡好看。 請避免把 After 做得古板、成熟過頭、商務感太強、老氣、沉悶、像中年通勤裝、像普通夾克西褲套裝。After 不能只是“更乾淨”，而是要明顯更帥、更時髦、更有造型完成度。 After 的風格應具備以下特徵： 1. 輪廓更利落：上身有結構感，肩線更精神，衣長更修飾比例。 2. 比例更優化：通過短外套、內搭層次、褲型和鞋型拉高視覺重心。 3. 層次更完整：外套、內搭、褲裝、鞋包、配飾形成完整造型，而不是單件換裝。 4. 配飾更精緻：可以加入銀色項鍊、手錶、戒指、眼鏡、斜挎包、小體量包袋等，但不要過度堆疊。 5. 鞋型更有風格：優先選擇復古運動鞋、德訓鞋、板鞋、樂福鞋或簡潔皮鞋，不要普通黑鞋。 6. 整體更上鏡：姿態更自然自信，氣質更鬆弛，視覺上更有潮流雜誌感。 【Before / After 主視覺】 整張圖的核心必須是 “Before vs After 雙人像強對比”，人物對比區佔整張圖約 55%—60% 的視覺權重。 Before： 呈現用戶原始形象或接近原始狀態的穿着基線，風格普通、真實、基礎、略顯單調，用來作爲改造前對照。姿勢可以更平直、更普通，服裝可以保持原圖中的基礎單品邏輯。 After： 呈現同一個人經過潮流升級後的新形象，必須明顯更帥、更潮、更有型。人物可以略大於 Before，姿態更自然自信，氣質更鬆弛上鏡。建議使用類似以下穿搭邏輯： - 短款夾克 / 飛行員夾克 / 工裝夾克 / 乾淨襯衫外套 / 輕機能外套 - 高質感白色或米白色內搭、針織內搭、乾淨圓領 T 恤 - 直筒褲、微闊褲、垂順西褲、寬鬆牛仔褲或卡其褲 - 復古運動鞋、德訓鞋、板鞋、樂福鞋 - 小體量斜挎包、銀色項鍊、手錶、戒指、眼鏡等精緻配飾 After 不要生成成傳統商務風，不要過於保守，不要像普通通勤男裝。要有“突然變會穿了”的感覺。 【版式設計要求】 整體版式要像「潮流雜誌內頁 + 專業形象顧問提案板」，不要像普通表格、說明書或電商拼圖。 畫面應具有更強的設計感： - 使用大膽但剋制的大標題 - 使用清晰的 Before / After 標籤 - 使用箭頭、分割線、編號模塊、半透明信息卡片 - 使用局部斜切塊、錯位網格、輕微層疊卡片、雜誌式留白 - 信息模塊要有秩序，但不要像 Excel 表格 - 背景以白色、淺灰、米白爲主，可加入炭黑、橄欖綠、鈷藍、金屬銀等少量強調色 - 整體高級、乾淨、時髦、有呼吸感，不要擁擠雜亂 標題建議： 「AI 衣品升級改造報告」 副標題： 「Before & After Style Upgrade Report」 也可加入： 「STYLE UPGRADE」 「TREND RESET」 「改造前」 「改造後」 「Your Personal Style Upgrade」 【內容模塊】 請在畫面中組織以下模塊，但主次要清楚，不能喧賓奪主。 1. 風格主題 / Style Direction 請自動根據用戶照片判斷最適合的升級方向，並給出一個清晰主題，例如： - 韓系輕潮煥新 / Korean Clean Street Reset - 清爽輕潮重塑 / Clean Urban Upgrade - 都市潮流重塑 / Urban Trend Reset - 日系簡約街頭 / Minimal City Boy Style - 港風鬆弛有型 / Relaxed Hong Kong Cool 主題說明要簡潔、有風格判斷，不要空泛。 2. 核心變化點 / Key Upgrades 用 5—6 個短標籤展示改造亮點，例如： - 輪廓更利落 - 比例更優化 - 層次更完整 - 配飾更精緻 - 鞋型更有風格 - 整體更上鏡 - 風格更明確 - 氣質更鬆弛 這些標籤要像專業造型顧問總結，不要太長。 3. 色系選擇 / Color Palette 展示改造後的色彩系統，建議包含： 主色 3 個，輔助色 2 個，點綴色 1 個。 優先使用更適合潮流男裝的高級色： 炭灰、黑、米白、燕麥色、橄欖綠、軍綠、牛仔藍、卡其灰、菸灰、深棕、藏藍、金屬銀。 請用小色卡或圓形色塊呈現，保持專業提案感。 4. 材質構成 / Materials 展示 4—5 種關鍵材質，並配簡短說明： - 純棉：舒適乾淨 - 尼龍：輕潮機能感 - 牛仔：保留鬆弛感 - 針織：增加柔和層次 - 皮革：提升質感 - 西裝面料：增強垂順比例 材質展示要有真實紋理感，但不要搶主視覺。 5. 廓形 / 比例策略 / Silhouette Strategy 總結 3—5 條讓 After 更帥的關鍵策略： - 上短下長，優化身材比例 - 外松內合，鬆弛但不拖沓 - 肩線更精神，輪廓更利落 - 褲型垂順，拉長腿部線條 - 鞋褲關係更乾淨，整體更上鏡 6. 推薦 Look / Outfit Ideas 生成 3 套圍繞改造後風格展開的完整穿搭 Look，作爲小縮略圖展示： Look 01：日常通勤 乾淨利落、輕潮實穿，適合日常工作和見人。 Look 02：週末出街 更鬆弛、更街頭、更有 City Boy 感，適合城市漫步、朋友聚會。 Look 03：約會漫步 更精緻、更有氛圍感，適合約會、拍照、輕社交場景。 每套 Look 都要比原始穿搭更潮、更完整、更有設計感。 7. 關鍵單品升級 / Key Pieces 展示 5—6 個最能帶來改造感的單品，例如： - 短款夾克 - 質感基礎 T 恤 - 直筒 / 微闊褲 - 復古運動鞋 - 小體量斜挎包 - 銀色項鍊 - 手錶 - 眼鏡 - 樂福鞋 每個單品配一句簡短作用說明，例如“優化比例”“提升層次”“增強潮流感”“增加精緻度”。 8. 細節說明 / Detail Notes 圍繞 After 人物加入細節箭頭或局部放大圓形註釋，說明： - 領口更乾淨 - 衣長關係更合理 - 層次疊穿更完整 - 包袋提升造型完成度 - 褲腳長度更利落 - 鞋型更有風格 - 配飾增加精緻感 這部分要讓畫面顯得更專業、更細膩。 9. 總結 / Summary 底部或右下角加入一句清晰總結： “這次升級在保留本人辨識度的前提下，通過更潮流的版型、更完整的搭配層次與更明確的鞋包配飾系統，讓整體形象從普通日常升級爲更帥氣、更時髦、更有型、更具潮牌感的狀態。” 【視覺質量要求】 整張圖需要達到以下效果： - 橫向 4:3 - 高完成度 - 高級潮流雜誌感 - 專業提案板感 - 主視覺清晰 - 前後對比強 - 版面有設計感 - 信息豐富但不擁擠 - 文字清晰易讀 - 色彩剋制但有風格 - 人物真實自然 - After 更帥、更潮、更上鏡 【嚴格避免】 請不要生成以下效果： - After 古板、老氣、商務化、成熟過頭 - 只是普通夾克 + 普通褲子，缺少潮流感 - 全身灰黑導致沉悶 - 像保險銷售、辦公室通勤、老幹部穿搭 - 過度暗黑、過度機能、過度先鋒 - 過度 logo 堆疊、過度熒光色、過度花哨 - 像 Excel 表格、PPT 模板、電商拼圖 - 信息模塊太滿、字太小、視覺混亂 - Before 和 After 不像同一個人 - 只換衣服但沒有氣質、比例、層次和配飾升級 最終輸出一張橫向 4:3 的「AI 衣品升級改造報告」。用戶第一眼應感受到“改造後明顯更帥、更潮、更會穿”，第二眼應感受到“這是一份專業、精緻、有設計感、可執行的個人穿搭升級方案”。

uni_5858 A hyperrealistic Apple iPhone 17 Pro Max advertisement shot in a dark 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@meng_dagg695
#product #iPhone #Apple
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-27
提示詞 Prompt
A hyperrealistic Apple iPhone 17 Pro Max advertisement shot in a dark, moody editorial style. A young stylish woman with a warm complexion and soft upswept brunette hair, wearing a dusty mauve velvet off-shoulder mini dress, thigh-high taupe suede heeled boots, and a thin black choker necklace, is captured mid-pose extending her arm forward holding an iPhone 17 Pro Max toward the camera in a confident selfie gesture. The phone — featuring a titanium Desert Sand finish with a flush quad-lens camera system and a edge-to-edge ProMotion display glowing with vivid color — dominates the center of the frame. The composition uses shallow depth of field with tack-sharp focus on the phone screen and extended arm, soft cinematic blur on the background figure. The near-black charcoal background is layered with subtle urban texture — faint graffiti strokes in electric yellow and muted olive barely visible through a heavy dark vignette. Multiple rows of ultra-small all-caps typographic text orbit the phone at different angles reading phrases like "EVERY ANGLE. EVERY MOMENT. EVERY YOU." and "THE SHOT YOU NEVER MISS" — some running vertically, some at 30-degree angles, creating a chaotic yet intentional graphic zine energy. At the upper right, the Apple logo appears in clean brushed silver against the dark background. At the top center, a thin horizontal navigation-style text bar reads "PRO CAMERA · TITANIUM BUILD · BEYOND INTELLIGENCE" in spaced all-caps serif font. A large commanding headline is placed center-right — "CAPTURE" in massive ultra-bold white letters followed by "EVERYTHING" in lighter weight creating dramatic type hierarchy. Small yellow plus (+) symbols and diagonal arrows (↗) scattered throughout as accent details. Bottom left features a bold slogan lockup: "YOUR WORLD. YOUR FRAME." in large bold sans-serif white text with a thin subline reading "The most powerful iPhone ever made. Every selfie is a cinematic moment." The overall lighting is dramatic and directional — a single cold key light from the upper left causing the titanium frame to shimmer, the ProMotion display to glow, and the velvet dress to catch a soft warm sheen against the darkness. Photorealistic. Commercial photography quality. High contrast. 4K resolution. 3:4 vertical format optimized for social media.

uni_5841 イラスト畫像 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@konmari_tweet
#design #設計
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-26
提示詞 Prompt
【テーマ】 {ここにテーマを入力} 【寫真】 {ここに使用する寫真の內容を簡潔に入力} （例：公園で遊ぶ子ども / 親子の笑顔 / 走る子ども など） --- テーマ「{テーマ}」に基づいた、 寫真と手描きイラストを融合したライフスタイル系エディトリアルビジュアル。 提供された寫真をメインビジュアルとして使用する。 ■ シーン 「{寫真}」に合った自然な日常の瞬間。 作り込みすぎないリアルな空気感、やわらかい自然光、 人物の自然な動きや感情を重視。 ■ 構図 人物を切り抜いたように配置し、 やわらかい無地背景の上にレイアウト。 ・餘白50%以上 ・左右非対稱構図 ・抜け感のあるミニマルなエディトリアルデザイン ■ イラスト（最重要） 細くて少しラフな手描きの線で、 ドゥードゥル（落書き風）イラストを重ねる。 ▼ルール ・全體の30〜40%以內 ・線は不均一で「少し下手」なニュアンス ・影・立體表現は禁止（フラット） ・人物の動きと連動させる（風・軌跡・流れ） ▼モチーフ（テーマ連動） ・{テーマ}を象徴する要素を追加 （例：こどもの日 → 鯉のぼり、風、空、草、雲、紙かぶと） ・風の線、動きの線、小さなアイコンなどで空気感を演出 ■ 色 やわらかいニュアンスカラー （くすみパステル、ナチュラルトーン） ■ 雰囲気 やさしい、エモーショナル、ストーリー性のある日常 ■ スタイル 北歐ミニマル ×上質なライフスタイル広告 ■ 品質 高解像度、商用レベルのクオリティ

uni_5837 城市宣傳海報 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@TanLuAI
#design #設計 #城市
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-26
提示詞 Prompt
請爲【城市名】生成豎版城市宣傳海報。不要套用固定模板，要先提煉這座城市最獨特的文化背景、地理環境、產業發展和城市理念，再據此設計畫面結構。 畫面必須讓人一眼看出這是【城市名】：選取該城市最具辨識度的歷史文化符號、自然地理符號、現代地標、產業特徵、生活氣質和未來願景。構圖不固定，可根據城市特色自由安排前景、中景、遠景和動勢元素。 要求體現： 歷史文化：該城市的傳統建築、地域文化、民俗、歷史記憶或精神象徵。 當下發展：現代天際線、產業特色、交通、商業、科技、金融、港口、生態等。 城市理念：用視覺隱喻表現這座城市的精神，比如開放、創新、煙火氣、國際化、山水人文、未來科技等。 海報質感：豎版 9:16，高端國潮城市宣傳海報，寫實數字繪景與水墨/光影融合，電影級光影，高細節，商業海報排版。 文字：城市名“【城市名】”可作爲書法主標題，另加一句符合城市氣質的宣傳語；避免大量小字亂碼。 不要通用城市拼貼，不要錯誤地標，不要廉價旅遊廣告感，不要卡通風，不要水印。

uni_5839 sci-fi movie poster 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@oggii_0
#design #設計 #poster
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-26
提示詞 Prompt
A stunning anime theatrical movie poster in portrait format. Studio Ghibli meets Makoto Shinkai visual language. A teenage girl in a tattered white shrine maiden robe stands on the wing of a crumbling giant stone deity — an ancient colossus covered in moss and glowing golden kanji script, slowly falling through a sea of clouds. Her long black hair streams upward against gravity. She reaches one hand toward the sky where a vast celestial rift tears open the heavens — beyond it, an inverted ocean floats above the clouds, ancient wooden cities hanging upside down from its surface, lanterns drifting like stars. The sky transitions from deep twilight blue at the bottom to a luminous peach and rose gold at the top. Volumetric god rays pierce through cloud layers. Cherry blossom petals and torn paper talismans spiral everywhere. Her expression is calm determination. Art style: hand-drawn 2D animation, ultra-detailed background painting, expressive linework, rich cel shading. Palette: deep indigo, peach, rose gold, warm amber, soft white. Title in large elegant Japanese kanji at the bottom with English subtitle beneath in a clean modern font. Tagline in small white italic text above the title. Mood: mythological, spiritual, bittersweet wonder. Theatrical release quality, Toho Films.

uni_5823 フォトグラフィーゲーム風のリアルなゲームキャプチャーを生成 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@SDT_side
#game #UI
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-26
提示詞 Prompt
フォトグラフィーゲーム風のリアルなゲームキャプチャーを生成。プレイヤーは畫像生成の作者で、參照畫像の被寫體をもとにプロンプトを入力し、被寫體を生成・調整しているシーン。三人稱視點のゲームプレイ畫面として見せ、畫面には生成ミッション、スコア、ミニマップ、被寫體選択枠、プロンプト入力欄、生成設定、実行ボタンなどのHUDを表示。自然な屋外光、リアルな背景、実際のゲームプレイ畫面のような雰囲気。16:9
uni_5830 What I Eat In A Day 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@Dheepanratnam
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-26
提示詞 Prompt
Design a viral 'what I eat in a day' visual board for [AUDIENCE], with four beautifully plated meals, timestamps, macro notes, soft lifestyle photography, clean collage layout, uplifting typography, bright natural colors, highly shareable wellness aesthetic
uni_5836 城市宣傳海報 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@TanLuAI
#design #設計 #城市
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-26
提示詞 Prompt
請爲【城市名】生成豎版城市宣傳海報。不要套用固定模板，要先提煉這座城市最獨特的文化背景、地理環境、產業發展和城市理念，再據此設計畫面結構。 畫面必須讓人一眼看出這是【城市名】：選取該城市最具辨識度的歷史文化符號、自然地理符號、現代地標、產業特徵、生活氣質和未來願景。構圖不固定，可根據城市特色自由安排前景、中景、遠景和動勢元素。 要求體現： 歷史文化：該城市的傳統建築、地域文化、民俗、歷史記憶或精神象徵。 當下發展：現代天際線、產業特色、交通、商業、科技、金融、港口、生態等。 城市理念：用視覺隱喻表現這座城市的精神，比如開放、創新、煙火氣、國際化、山水人文、未來科技等。 海報質感：豎版 9:16，高端國潮城市宣傳海報，寫實數字繪景與水墨/光影融合，電影級光影，高細節，商業海報排版。 文字：城市名“【城市名】”可作爲書法主標題，另加一句符合城市氣質的宣傳語；避免大量小字亂碼。 不要通用城市拼貼，不要錯誤地標，不要廉價旅遊廣告感，不要卡通風，不要水印。

uni_5807 博物館圖鑑式中文拆解信息圖 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@MrLarus
#outfit #design #設計 #漢服
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-26
提示詞 Prompt
請根據【主題】自動生成一張“博物館圖鑑式中文拆解信息圖”。 要求整張圖兼具真實寫實主視覺、結構拆解、中文標註、材質說明、紋樣寓意、色彩含義和核心特徵總結。你需要根據【主題】自動判斷最合適的主體對象、服飾體系、器物結構、時代風格、關鍵部件、材質工藝、顏色方案與版式結構，用戶無需再提供其他信息。 整體風格應爲：國家博物館展板、歷史服飾圖鑑、文博專題信息圖，而不是普通海報、古風寫真、電商詳情頁或動漫插畫。背景採用米白、絹紙白、淺茶色等紙張質感，整體高級、剋制、專業、可收藏。 版式固定爲： - 頂部：中文主標題 + 副標題 + 導語 - 左側：結構拆解區，中文引線標註關鍵部件，並配局部特寫 - 右上：材質 / 工藝 / 質感區，展示真實紋理小樣並附說明 - 右中：紋樣 / 色彩 / 寓意區，展示主色板、紋樣樣本和文化解釋 - 底部：穿着順序 / 構成流程圖 + 核心特徵總結 若主題適合人物展示，則以真實人物全身站姿爲中央主體；若更適合器物或單體結構，則改爲中心主體拆解圖，但整體仍保持完整中文信息圖形式。所有文字必須爲簡體中文，清晰、規整、可讀，不要亂碼、錯字、英文或拼音。重點突出真實結構、材質差異、文化說明與圖鑑氣質。 避免：海報感、影樓感、電商感、動漫感、cosplay感、亂標註、錯結構、糊字、假材質、過度裝飾。
uni_5816 an ultra-realistic magazine cover inspired by TIME 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@miratechtool
#TIME #design #magazine
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：img2img | 日期：2026-04-26
提示詞 Prompt
Create an ultra-realistic magazine cover inspired by TIME. A confident young woman named [Name] is featured as the main cover star. She stands centered, making direct eye contact with a powerful, calm expression. She is styled in modern, elegant fashion — minimal yet bold (e.g., tailored blazer, sleek dress, or contemporary couture). Her hair is perfectly styled, and makeup is natural but editorial-grade.

📌 來源：X@frametheory058
#design #infographic #color #clothes
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：img2img | 日期：2026-04-25

uni_5799 Supercars high end poster 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@Diplomeme
#poster #design #設計 #海報 #car
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-25
提示詞 Prompt
4:5 vertical social poster, ultra high resolution, 8K SCENE / BACKGROUND: Flat racing yellow with subtle gradient (light → deep amber) Grain texture 2–3% Soft rectangular overlays at 3% opacity PRODUCT: Porsche 911 GT3 RS Gloss yellow with carbon details Rear 3/4 angle, slightly elevated Wing dominant Position: Right of center TYPOGRAPHY: “PORSCHE” Ultra tall, condensed, stretched Deep charcoal Secondary: “PORSCHE 911 GT3 RS” EDITORIAL: “Porsche — Where Precision Meets Passion” Focus: engineering, obsession, track DNA FADED TEXT: “GT3 RS” at 3–5% SPECS: 386 kW / 525 PS 3.2 s 296 km/h LIGHTING: Clean studio, sharp highlights MOOD: Precision. Iconic. Timeless performance. FORMAT: 4:5 vertical social poster, ultra high resolution, 8K, print-quality sharpness SCENE / BACKGROUND: Flat, high-saturation BMW blue background Gradient: Top → slightly lighter electric blue Bottom → deep navy blue Surface: - Subtle grain texture (2–3%) - Faint rectangular overlays (2–4% opacity) - Clean, graphic — no realism Shadow: Soft contact shadow under car PRODUCT (CAR): BMW M4 CSL Color: Matte frozen blue / deep metallic navy Angle: Rear 3/4 perspective (IMPORTANT — match Porsche angle for consistency) Slightly elevated camera Position: Slightly right of center Details: - Carbon roof visible - Aggressive diffuser - Sharp reflections - Subtle brake detail COMPOSITION: IDENTICAL to Porsche: Top → branding Middle → giant type Center → car overlap Bottom → editorial + specs TYPOGRAPHY: PRIMARY: “BMW” Style: Ultra condensed bold sans serif Tall vertical scaling (same as Porsche) Color: Deep navy / near black Behavior: Static (NO distortion — unlike previous version) Acts as structural backdrop SECONDARY HEADER: “BMW M4 CSL” Thin, wide tracking LOGO AREA: BMW roundel centered above EDITORIAL BLOCK: Headline: “BMW — Where Driving Becomes Instinct” Body: Focus on: - driver connection - control - performance precision Boxed layout, same structure as Porsche FADED TEXT: “CSL” large, 3–5% opacity behind box BOTTOM LEFT: “M4 CSL” BOTTOM RIGHT SPECS: 405 kW / 550 PS 3.4 s 307 km/h LIGHTING: Clean studio lighting Sharp but controlled highlights COLOR GRADING: Deep blues, high contrast, clean blacks CAMERA: 50mm, slightly elevated rear 3/4 MOOD: Performance. Precision. Driver focus.
uni_5796 年輕成年女性獨自站在昏黃路燈和公交站燈箱下 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
#scene #bus #rain #night
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-25
提示詞 Prompt
在雨夜的城市公交站臺，一位年輕成年女性獨自站在昏黃路燈和公交站燈箱下，微微低頭看手機，沒有看向鏡頭，展現自然等待的狀態。她穿着淺色薄外套、深色半裙和白色運動鞋，長髮自然垂落，一隻手拿着手機，另一隻手輕握透明雨傘。人物位於畫面右側三分之一的位置，左側有模糊的前景遮擋，像從街邊人羣或車窗邊緣偶然看到的一瞬間。公交站牌、廣告燈箱、路燈杆和雨傘邊緣形成清晰的豎向與斜向線條，引導視線。地面有雨水反光，遠處車燈和霓虹被虛化成柔和光斑。整體爲冷藍色雨夜環境與暖黃色路燈混合的真實城市光線，柔和頂光和側光，沒有強烈擺拍感。淺景深使主體清晰，背景略微虛化，畫面帶真實相機顆粒感、輕微運動模糊和不完美構圖，呈現隨手抓拍的真實瞬間。照片風格真實自然，非寫真、非廣告大片，無文字水印。
uni_5789 A high-art cinematic multiple exposure portrait of a young woman in deep red tones 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
#effect #red #photography #dreamlike
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-25
提示詞 Prompt
A high-art cinematic multiple exposure portrait of a young woman in deep red tones, blending several overlapping profiles and full-body angles into a surreal composition. The image features soft natural skin detail, flowing red fabric, and atmospheric double exposure layers that merge her figure with oceanic landscapes and moody skies. Warm crimson lighting and subtle shadows create depth and emotion, emphasizing themes of identity, memory, and introspection. Ultra-detailed, editorial fashion photography style, dreamlike and ethereal mood, soft contrast, fine art aesthetic.

模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-25
提示詞 Prompt
Knolling 風格攝影，完全解構的【物品/主題】，解構學概念，嚴格垂直頂視，平鋪擺放。各組件有序展開，整體以 Bento Grid 作爲排列邏輯，同時帶有自然輕微隨機性。組件按大小、形狀、顏色、材質等特徵呈漸變或遞進規律，局部方向略有偏轉，增加視覺趣味。每個組件的排列遵循視覺秩序，位置不刻意對稱，但保持整體和諧美感。包括【具體組成部分】、【其他組件】等，位置和佈局需有細緻的設計感，但不拘泥於對稱規則。每一張的右下角用中文行書小字展示該物品的名稱，並配上一張未解構的原始圖像。 莫蘭迪治癒系背景色，並且保證背景和物品的對比度。 畫面邊緣需保留一處用於放置【工具/配件】，如金屬鑷子或其他與主題相關的物品，材質可選擇金屬、不鏽鋼等，設計簡潔且細長，輕輕置於邊緣，與整體佈局協調，方向自然，光影一致。工具/配件位置固定在畫面外緣附近，但不遮擋任何關鍵組件或標籤。 光影與質感：從邊緣到邊緣填滿畫面，無留白；柔和影棚布光，無硬陰影；8k 超高清、超寫實微距質感，細節清晰、光滑，材質層次分明，物品表面光澤與質感生動展現，色彩自然生動，呈現真實攝影感。 畫面比例：2:1 拆解物品：芭比娃娃

Create a cohesive collection of playful icons for [BRAND NAME], a [BRAND TYPE/INDUSTRY] brand. Style should be [STYLE KEYWORDS: e.g., rounded, 3D, flat, hand-drawn, minimal] with a [COLOR STYLE: vibrant, pastel, gradient, monochrome] palette. Use [DESIGN TRAITS: soft shadows, bold outlines, subtle textures, glow, etc.] to give a friendly and modern feel. Maintain consistency across all icons with a unified grid, proportions, and visual language. Icons should represent [LIST OF FEATURES/FUNCTIONS]. Ensure high clarity, balanced spacing, and scalable design suitable for UI, apps, and branding.
uni_5797 Object Infographics 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
📌 來源：X@TechieBySA
#product #infographics
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：txt2img | 日期：2026-04-25
提示詞 Prompt
Create an infographic image of [OBJECT], combining a realistic photograph or photoreal render of the object with technical annotation overlays placed directly on top. Use black ink–style line drawings and text (technical pen / architectural sketch look) on a pure white studio background, including: •Key component labels •Internal cutaway or exploded-view outlines •Measurements, dimensions, and scale markers •Material callouts and quantities •Arrows indicating function, force, or flow (air, sound, power, pressure) •Simple schematic or sectional diagrams where relevant Place the title [OBJECT] inside a hand-drawn technical annotation box in one corner. Style & layout rules: •The real object remains clearly visible beneath the annotations •Annotations feel sketched, technical, and architectural •Clean composition with balanced negative space •Educational, museum-exhibit / engineering-manual vibe Visual style: Minimal technical illustration aesthetic, black linework over realistic imagery, precise but slightly hand-drawn feel. Color palette: White background, black annotation lines and text only. No colors. Output: 1080×1080, ultra-crisp, social-feed optimized, no watermark.

a dreamy Kyoto Japan travel diary spread, open notebook on a bright white windowsill, young Asian woman as a poetic travel muse based on the reference image, soft natural smile, long dark wavy hair, wearing a white dress and fluffy cream cardigan. The notebook is decorated with taped polaroids of Fushimi Inari red torii gates, Kiyomizu-dera temple, Arashiyama bamboo grove, Gion lantern street, Kamogawa riverside, cherry blossoms, maple leaves and matcha cafés. Add cute journaling elements: pastel washi tape, Kyoto train tickets, shrine stamp book pages, omamori charm, ema prayer plaque, tiny cat stickers, bunny stickers, sakura stickers, dango doodles, matcha parfait illustration, coffee shop receipt, small handwritten notes, soft rounded paper labels, ribbon bookmarks, pastel paper clips. Soft pastel pink, warm cream, sage green and lavender color palette, airy natural window light, calm healing atmosphere, cute romantic scrapbook collage, high-end editorial travel journal design, photorealistic, ultra detailed, delicate paper texture, magazine layout, dreamy soft focus

提示詞 Prompt
日系寫實風格，真人攝影質感，年輕東亞女性，奶茶棕色長髮帶自然層次與碎髮，皮膚細緻有微光澤，淡妝（裸妝、柔和眼妝、粉色脣） 場景：室內居家空間，木質地板，背景為簡約衣櫃與牆面，左側有落地窗透進自然陽光，光線為柔和側光，形成自然陰影與立體感 人物動作：坐在地板上，雙腿自然收起偏側坐姿，一手撐在地面支撐身體，另一手自然放在腿上，身體微微前傾但保持自然，頭稍微傾斜看向鏡頭 表情與氛圍：眼神柔和、微微帶距離感，嘴脣微開，表情安靜自然，有生活感與輕微曖昧氛圍但不刻意 服裝：淺藍色細肩帶蕾絲貼身洋裝，外搭薄款開襟罩衫，罩衫自然滑落肩膀，布料柔軟貼合身形，呈現自然垂墜感 攝影風格：iPhone隨手抓拍感＋雜誌質感， 50mm鏡頭視角，淺景深，背景微虛化，光線自然不曝，真實皮膚紋理與毛孔細節 負面提示詞 不要：變形手指、錯誤肢體比例、過度磨 皮、塑膠皮膚、3D感、動漫風、過度誇張表情、衣服變形、光線不自然、過曝、臉部走樣

在地鐵車廂內，一位年輕女性坐在靠近車門的座位上，人物外貌與服裝皆需參考上傳圖片中的女性（包含臉部特徵、氣質、髮型與穿搭風格，服裝需與圖片中一致），低頭專注於手機，呈現自然狀態，沒有看向鏡頭。人物位於畫面右側三分之一的位置，左側有模糊的前景遮擋，營造出偷拍視角。車門與扶手形成清晰的垂直線條，引導視線。整體為冷色調的地鐵燈光，柔和的頂光，沒有明顯強烈陰影，淺景深使主體清晰、背景略微虛化。畫面帶有真實相機的顆粒感與輕微不完美的構圖，呈現隨手抓拍的真實瞬間，而非刻意擺拍。

uni_5749 Car Interior Look with Black Pantyhose 📷 UniFormeGPT-2
#黑絲 #car #pose
模型：GPT Image 2 | 類型：img2img | 日期：2026-04-24
提示詞 Prompt
Use the uploaded reference image as the character’s only source of appearance. Strictly preserve the same face, including facial features and proportions, skin tone, hairline, eye shape, nose shape, lip shape, and overall facial contour. Do not swap faces, transform the character into someone else, or alter the appearance to resemble any other character. A young woman with long, softly wavy light brown hair, styled naturally with a side part. She has a gentle, confident smile and soft, charming eyes, looking directly toward the camera. She is seated inside a modern car interior, sitting on the passenger seat. The environment includes black leather seats, dashboard details, and a bright outdoor scene visible through the window, adding depth and realism. She is wearing a casual black oversized top, giving a relaxed and slightly stylish look. Her legs are the main visual focus, covered in black pantyhose. The black pantyhose are sheer with subtle texture patterns, tightly fitted to the legs. The material shows a soft sheen under natural daylight, highlighting the smooth contours and curvature of her legs. The contrast between the black pantyhose and her skin tone enhances the leg definition, making them visually striking and elegant. She is sitting with her legs slightly bent and angled toward the camera, creating a natural perspective flow from foreground to background. Her posture is relaxed, one hand holding a drink with a straw, the other lightly touching her hair. She is wearing glossy red high heels, which add a bold color contrast and draw additional attention to the lower body and legs. Camera angle is slightly low and positioned closer to the legs, using a mild wide-angle perspective (around 28–35mm). This subtly exaggerates leg length and depth, making the legs appear longer and more dominant in the composition while still keeping the face clearly visible. Lighting is natural daylight coming through the car window, soft and balanced, creating gentle highlights and shadows across the subject. Depth of field is shallow, keeping the subject sharp while slightly softening the background. Photorealistic, ultra-detailed, cinematic composition, emphasis on black pantyhose, elegant yet casual mood, modern lifestyle aesthetic.
